The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: What is the current fee structure for courses at Indira Gandhi Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences?
faqs.answer: The fees structure for programs offerred by the Indira Gandhi Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences is INR 356000.

faqs.question: Which courses does Indira Gandhi Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences offer?
faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences provides programmes including M.Pharma, B.Pharma, D.Pharma in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is not good.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very poor. For the Diploma in Pharmacy, there are no placements. Mostly, students are placed through referrals from teachers. The highest package offered was 1.8 LPA, and the lowest package offered was 1.2 LPA. Mostly, students are placed in different production units in the pharma industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available all over the campus with CCTV security. There are two hostels: one boys' hostel outside the campus and a girls' hostel inside the campus. Labs are spacious, with all the apparatus used in the industry. Classrooms are spacious as well. There is a cricket ground, a volleyball court, and a badminton court on the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: A very good college for D. Pharma.

review_content.Placements: For D. Pharma students, the placement opportunities were very poor. Most students got selected in different hospitals and production units in the pharma sector. The highest package offered was 1.8 LPA, and the lowest package offered was 1.2 LPA. Three months of hospital training was compulsory.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility was available all over the campus, with CCTV security. There were two hostels, one boys' hostel outside the campus and a girls' hostel inside the campus. There were a cricket ground, a volleyball court, and a badminton court on the campus. Labs were spacious and had all chemicals used in the industry. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: For D.Pharma, it is a good college.

review_content.Placements: After D. Pharma, we can make our own medicine shops by issuing our license from PCI and following the process. Otherwise, we can go for medical and work as pharmacists there or we can get admission to B. Pharma directly from the 2nd year (3rd semester) because we are D. Pharma students. And after B. Pharma, we can get placements in any medical management company, druggist, medicine representative, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: College hostels are good. For both boys and girls, hostels are available. And hostel fees are more than study fees. Because it adds up to the travel fees of the bus from the hostel to the college. All the pharmacy events, health awareness programs, annual functions, and sports days are being celebrated. Our college consists of 3 courses: D. Pharma (3 batches), B. Pharma (4 batches), and MPHARM (3 batches). So a maximum number of students participate here. The fees are good for students. Hence, our college is a private college; that's why some fees are high. Also, in diploma pharmacy, students need to pay 60,000 for one year and it keeps changing as the government's study fees change year by year. And the extra hostel fee is also here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is better in this college so it is a better college to take admission.

review_content.Placements: Almost 65% of students got placed in our course. The course fee is Rs.90,000 per yesr. The top recruiting companies are Cipla, Pharmazell Pvt Ltd, etc. Many students got internships in companies like Medo Pharma Pvt Ltd, Anjan Drug Pvt Ltd, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. Laboratory is great. Classrooms are well-furnished. It also provides a good library. Wi-Fi is not available. Hostel facilities are good. The food served in the hostel is average. Sports is also prioritised in our department. Medical facilities are not available. There are some hospitals for emergencies. Sports are conducted so that students can enroll in every sport.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Indira Gandhi College is good but nowadays this college gave us very poor faculty and poor placement

review_content.Placements: Our batch is excellent. After completing the course, you can work at government hospitals, medicine shop, etc. The course offers many jobs. Some top recruiters are Sunpharma, Mankind, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Poor infrastructure and average teaching method apply in this campus. The campus interview is also average and the campus also provides Wi-Fi, library, labs and classrooms. The campus of the hostel is very bad with surroundings. The students are very smart.
review_content.Faculty: Minimum 2 or 3 teachers are good but there are all the cruel and selfish teachers. Teaching quality is average but the course is good for the students. The semester exams are very difficult.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is improving at its best to be one of the best colleges in Odisha.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students get placed from our college. The average salary offered is Rs.14,000 per month with extra allowance of Rs.6,000. SNK organics is the top recruiting company. Internships are not provided but medical training is given in government hospitals. Many roles can be expected from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is good when compared to other pharmacy colleges. Gym, playground, and canteen are not available. Library and study rooms are not updated. Hostels are not properly managed.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are qualified with Masters and Ph.D. They lack interest in teaching due to the lack of interest of students towards studies. Students want to get a pharma certificate to open medical shops. Teaching is average. Exams are conducted very strictly despite teaching poorly.

admission_process.title: Indira Gandhi Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indira Gandhi Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Indira Gandhi Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciencesoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Pharma, D.Pharma and M.Pharma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 3,56,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MSc at SRTMUN?
faqs.answer:
The total tuition fee for MSc at SRTMUN Nanded ranges from INR 2, 640 - INR 72,240. Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University, Nanded offers an MSc programme via its School of Chemical Science, School of Computational Sciences, School of Earth Sciences and School of Life Sciences, among others. For admission to this course, students must take the SRTMUN MSc entrance exam, also known as the University's Common Entrance Test (CET). Given below is the minimum eligibility criteria for MSc along with all the specialisations and seat intake:

college_info.intro: Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University has over 146 programmes in 14 Schools in the campus and 4 Schools in sub-campuses. SRTMU Naled has flagship programmes in BTech, MSc and MBA. Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University offers postgraduate course in MBA,MTech,MSc and many more on Chemical Sciences, Commerce and Management Sciences, Computational Sciences, Earth Sciences, Educational Sciences, Fine and performing Arts, Language, Literature and culture Studies, Life sciences, Mathematical sciences, Media Studies, Pharmacy, physical sciences, social sciences and interdisciplinary studies. Some of the courses offered by Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University, its eligibility and SRTMUN fees are as follows:

faqs.question: How are the placements at Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University?

faqs.answer: A:    The course-wise placement details are not available on the official website of Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University. However, the SRTMUN NIRF report 2024 reveals that a total of 106 PG 2-years students were placed out of total 1,303 PG 2-years students during SRTMUN placements 2023. The key highlights of SRTMUN placements for the Class of 2023 are tabulated below:  Particulars  PG 2-Years Placement Statistics (2023)Median package offeredINR 5.08 LPATotal students1,303Total students
faqs.question: How are the MBA placements at SRTMUN?

faqs.answer: A:    As per unofficial online sources, SRTMUN alumni are working under multiple sectors, such as Engineering, Business Development, IT, Operations, Education and more. Engineering sector has placed the most number of SRTMUN students. The sector-wise SRTMUN alumni placement statistics are presented below: Note: The “Others” category includes the functions of Finance, Accounting, Administrative, Human Resources and Customer Success and Support.
faqs.question: Where do SRTMUN alumni work?

review_summary.college_name: SRTMUN Nanded Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure and learning but lacks management and placements.

content.Placements: Till date, only 20% of the students are placed, with the average package being 4 LPA. The placement is very low compared to previous years, and the companies that visit are not really great, mostly providing approximately 4 LPA. The only roles offered are as software engineers in campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is at par, with hostels around average facilities. Wi-Fi is accessible everywhere on the campus, and the labs provide great student facilities. The quality of the food in the boys' hostel is not great, and campus food is better. The college's inclusion and motivation in sports is very good. Students also need to note that the hostel is based upon marks and admission category, and everyone might not get a hostel allotted. The other option is to live outside the campus in nearby PGs, and the experience is the worst.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure, the worst faculty.

content.Placements: The average package is around 3 LPA, and the highest package is around 10 LPA, but only 25% of students get placed in the CSE department. Take admission in Information Technology or Automation and Robotics instead of CSE; you will get a lot of opportunities and qualified faculty compared to CSE.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is too good. The hostel is good, and the quality of food is nice. The sports faculty is not working and has some personal issues. In sports, there is no crowd, and you will get free Wi-Fi to use. There are 10 labs in the CSE, so there is no problem; you will get many chances.

Around 20-30% of students from our batch get placed through campus drives. The average package offered is around 1.5-2 LPA, with the lowest package starting from 1 LPA and the highest package going up to 5-6 LPA depending on the course and company.
content.Infrastructure: College has a well-maintained campus with spacious classrooms. Along with computer labs, science labs, and Wi-Fi. A good library with sufficient academic books and journals. Laboratories are regularly updated. They are useful for practical learning. Campus environment is peaceful. It is suitable for studies.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Tuition fee is affordable to pay.

content.Placements: Emerging companies like Elin Electronics, Keynes Technology, Optimus Electronics, and VVDN Technology from the side of electronics are major recruiting core companies mentioned in the records, alongside top MNCs like TCS, Infosys, and EY, which are a few of the companies with higher pay.
content.Infrastructure: The requests of students are taken into account immediately, but they provide solutions only after a long time by having frequent discussions about it. They are charging only a minimal tuition fee, as students from the native area, along with those from weaker sections, are applying.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Life and learning at Channabasweshwar Pharmacy College.

content.Placements: An average of 10 percent students are placed in the course. The highest package is 4 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies for B Pharmacy are Cipla, Sun Pharma, and Dr. Reddy. Internship is provided by our college in Grinsaons Pharmaceutical Industry, Satara, and also at V Square, Mumbai. Posts like HR, clinical pharmacist, data analyst, and pharmacovigilance are the top roles. The placements in my college are decent but improving. Some pharmaceutical companies visit the campus for roles like medical representative, production trainee, quality control, and sales.

admission_overview.title: SRTMUN Nanded Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: SRTMUN Nanded admission is both merit and entrance-based. Admission to PG courses, such as MSc, MCA, etc., is based on Common Entrance Test (CET), conducted by the university. The university also accepts the scores of MAH CET and MHT CET for admission to MBA and Pharma courses, respectively. Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University (SRTMUN), Maharashtra offers over 140 courses at the UG, PG and PhD levels at campus or through affiliated colleges. The university offers these courses via its 13 different schools and centres. Apart from regular courses, SRTMUN also offers distance education programmes.

faqs.question: How can I apply for B.Ed at SRTMUN?

paragraphs: Admission toSRTMUN UG and PG coursesare both merit and entrance-based. Aspirants need to qualify for the minimum eligibility and qualify for the respective entrance exams for specific courses where it is needed. As per the next step, students need to fill out an online application form by visiting the official website of SRTMUN. Find below all the steps to get admission to SRTMUN:
STEP1: SRTMUN Application Process 2025
SRTMUN accepts an online mode of application process. Candidates seeking admission need to visit the official website of the university and apply online.
STEP 2: Selection Process

SRTMUN shortlists candidates based on state-level entrance exams, such as MAH B.Ed CET, MAH MBA CET, MHT CET, etc. for admission to specific courses. The university conducts Common Entrance Test (CET) for admission to programmes, such as BSc, MSc, etc. For all others, merit in the last qualifying exam is considered for admission. Besides, the university conducts an entrance test-PET for admission to PhD course. Candidates must score equal or aboveSRTMUN cutofffor admission.
STEP 3: Merit List and Counselling

The university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. The merit list includes name of the shortlisted candidates, name of the college, obtained marks, etc. Aspirants appearing for Maharashtra entrance exams are offered seats through Common Admission Process (CAP). For others, aspirants need to come for university counselling. Shortlisted aspirants must pay the programme fee to confirm their seat in the university.

SRTMUN feeis sum of multiple components, out of which some are paid one-time while others are paid semester-wise. The components include tuition fee, caution deposit, hostel and mess charges, etc. The one-time fee isINR 30for each programme. The fee of SRTMUN is quite affordable for all the courses. Candidates can get admission in a course for as low as INR 2,200. Below isSRTMUN feeand average package for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SRTMUN seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates can get a seat in UG or PG programme based on their merit or national/ state-level entrance exam. The university reserves seats for reserved category candidates. The university reserves some seats for reserved category candidates. One must hold the document relevant to their claim to avail the reservation benefit. Below isSRTMUN seat intakefor top programmes offered at the campus and via affiliated colleges:

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in SRTMUN?
faqs.answer: SRTMUN offer seats to candidates based on national/ state-level entrance exam or merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants are first required to register for the course of their choice via online mode. SRTMUN shortlists candidates based on state-level entrance exams such as MAH B.Ed CET, MAH MBA CET, MHT CET, etc. for admission to specific courses.The university conducts Common Entrance Test (CET) for admission to programmes such as BSc, MSc, etc. For all others, merit in the last qualifying exam is considered for admission. The university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Shortlisted aspirants must pay the programme fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Does SRTMUN conduct entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, SRTMUN conducts an entrance exam for admission to PhD course. The university conducts PET in pen and paper mode at three centres, namely Nanded, Latur and Parbhani. The entrance test is conducted for two hours and includes section-A and section-B. Section-A is related to research methodology and includes 50 questions. Section-B is subject specific and includes 50 questions.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University?
faqs.answer: Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University offers good placements for courses like BTech, MBA and BPharma, etc. The placement details of Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University for the academic year 2023-2024 is yet to be released. Meanwhile, let’s take a look at the key highlights of Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University placements for the Class of 2022 and 2023 in the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) Median package UG 4-years ( BTech , BPharma ) INR 1.80 LPA INR 1.50 LPA Median package PG 2-years ( MA , MBA , MSc ) INR 3.45 LPA INR 5.08 LPA Total students UG 4-years 63 66 Total students placed UG 4-years 9 5 Total students PG 2-years 1,375 1303 Total students placed PG 2-years 52 106 Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What are the year-wise placement trends at SRTMUN?
faqs.answer: The course-wise trends witnessed during SRTMUN placements between 2021 and 2023 with respect to the total students and no. of students placed are presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2021) Placement Statistics (2022) Placement Statistics (2023) UG 4-year Total students: 58 Students placed: 9 Total students: 63 Students placed: 9 Total students: 66 Students placed: 5 PG 2-year Total students: 1411 Students placed: 48 Total students: 1375 Students placed: 52 Total students: 1303 Students placed: 106 Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How are the MBA placements at SRTMUN?
faqs.answer: The course-wise placement details are not available on the official website of Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University. However, the SRTMUN NIRF report 2024 reveals that a total of 106 PG 2-years students were placed out of total 1,303 PG 2-years students during SRTMUN placements 2023. The key highlights of SRTMUN placements for the Class of 2023 are tabulated below: Particulars PG 2-Years Placement Statistics (2023) Median package offered INR 5.08 LPA Total students 1,303 Total students placed 106 Note : The above-mentioned data are gathered from the Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What are the job options after B.Ed from SRTMUN?
faqs.answer: After completing the B.Ed degree from one of the best B.Ed Colleges in Maharashtra, students are open to various job opportunities. Aspirants can become teachers at the primary, secondary and senior secondary levels in private schools. Below are some of the job profiles available after B.Ed from SRTMUN: Job Profile Average Annual Salary (in INR) School Teacher 5- 9 LPA Curriculum Developer 3.5- 6 LPA Private Educator 2.5- 4 LPA Career Counsellor 4- 6 LPA Education Administrator 6- 9 LPA

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MSc at SRTMUN?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MSc at SRTMUN Nanded ranges from INR 2, 640 - INR 72,240. Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University, Nanded offers an MSc programme via its School of Chemical Science, School of Computational Sciences, School of Earth Sciences and School of Life Sciences, among others. For admission to this course, students must take the SRTMUN MSc entrance exam, also known as the University's Common Entrance Test (CET). Given below is the minimum eligibility criteria for MSc along with all the specialisations and seat intake: MSc Specialisation Eligibility Criteria Seat Intake Organic Chemistry BSc with Chemistry/ Industrial Chemistry/Analytical Chemistry as an optional/subject from any recognised University 20 Computer Application Science graduate (BSc) BCA/ BSc (CS)/ Engineering graduates 30 Geology BSc graduate with Geology/Physics/Chemistry/Life Sciences 20 Bio-Technology Science Graduate in relevant subject 20 Mathematics BA/ BSc with Mathematics as one of the optional subjects 50

description: SRTMUN Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for admission to MCA courses based on the MAH MCA CET exam. Students can also scroll down the page to know the cutoff of various other accepting exams. A few more exam-related updates are below:

The SRTMUN JEE Main Cutoff 2025 was released for admission to BE/BTech courses across multiple categories under the All India quota. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for various rounds.

For the General AI category, the last round cutoff ranged from 216651 to 676849, wherein the hardest course for admission for this category was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with the last round cutoff of . Students can see the table below to know the first and

SRTMUN BTech cutoff 2025 can be seen in this section, as well as the cutoffs for 2024 and 2023. For the General AI category, the top two hardest courses for admission were BTech in Computer Science and Engineering, followed by BTech in Information Technology, with the last round cutoff being 216651 and 232013, respectively.

Students who want admission to the BE/BTech courses have to appear for the JEE Main entrance examination and sit for the counselling process to have a chance at admission. Since the admissions for 2025 are over, candidates can see the table below to know the JEE Main important dates for admission in the upcoming 2026-27 cycle.

In this section, students can either view or download the round and year-wise consolidated PDF cutoff list for 2025, 2024 and 2023. Analysing the previous years cutoffs helps students better understand the cutoff trend over the years

SRTMUN MHT CET Cutoff 2025 was concluded with the declaration of the results for the final round. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing percentiles for admission to the BE/BTech course for all rounds and categories belonging to both the All India and Home State quotas.
For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff was 90.85 for admission to the BTech in Computer Science and Engineering course at the affiliated college,

As per the SRTMUN BTech cutoff 2025 for admission to the BTech in Computer Science and Engineering, the hardest college for admission in the last round was M S Bidve Engineering College, with a cutoff of 90.97 for the General HS quota students. Admission for the same course in the last round for the OBC HS quota was possible with a cutoff percentile of 73.56, making the competition for this category less competitive than the General HS category.

SRTMU accepts the MHT CET examination results for admission to the BE/BTech courses for numerous categories under both the All India and Home State quotas. Students who are aiming for admission to the same courses should keep track of the important dates related to events, like registration, exam dates, etc., so as not to miss out on any deadline. To aid with the same, candidates can see the table below to know the MHT CET important dates 2026.

Analysing the cutoff trends over the years helps students know what the qualifying percentile could be for admissions for the upcoming admission 2026-27 cycle at Swami Ramanand Teerth Marathwada University. To help with the same, students can either view or download the round and year-wise consolidated PDF list for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for multiple categories under both the All India and Home State quota from the table below.

For the General AI category, the last round cutoff scores fell between 4.36 and 68.54, wherein the hardest course for admission was the course at . Students can see the table below to k

SRTMUN MH CET Law cutoff 2025 can be accessed in this section. Students can also view the past two-year cutoff data, i.e., of 2024 and 2023. In 2025, the last round cutoff for BA LLB course was 42.06.

In 2024 and 2023, the last round cutoff data for the same course were 53.05 and 55 percentiles, respectively, for the students belonging to the General HS quota. Comparing the three-year cutoff data, it is evident that the cutoff trend has been decreasing for the aforementioned course for this cate

MHCET Law entrance exam is conducted for admission to law courses for all categories under both the All India and Home State quota. Students who want to gain admission to this institute can refer to the table below to know the MHCET Law Important Dates 2026.

MHCET Law counselling process 2025 is over for admission to the BA LLB and LLB courses. This section is beneficial for students who want admission to the aforementioned courses. Students can either view or download the consolidated round and year-wise PDFs list for MHCET Law counselling for 2025, 2024 and 2023 from the table given below.

SRTMUN MAH BEd CET Cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BEd course for all rounds and categories under the All India and Home State quota. The cutoff was published in the form of opening and closing scores.

For the General AI category, the last round cutoff ranged from 52.04 to 0.74, wherein the hardest college for admission was , with the closing score of . In contrast, the easiest college for admission was , with th

In this section, students can find the SRTMUN BEd cutoff 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 for various categories, rounds, quotas, and colleges. The cutoff was released till 3 rounds. For the OBC HS category, the most competitive college for admission in 2025 was Abhinav College of Education, Latur, with a last-round cutoff score of 92.16, followed by Smt. Indira Gandhi Adhyapak Mahavidyalya, with a closing score of 84.66 in the last round.

SRTMUN accepts the MAH BEd CET entrance examination scores for admission to the BEd course. Students should remain updated with the latest information regarding the application start date, exam date, etc. To help with the same, students can see the table below that contains the MAH BEd CET important dates for admission at SRTMUN.

Only those students who had appeared for the MAH BEd CET entrance exam and sat for the counselling process are eligible to be considered for admission to the BEd course. Students who want admission to the same course can see the table below to either view or download the consolidated PFD cutoff list of counselling for 2025 and 2024 for various rounds.

The SRTMUN MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MBA/PGDM admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 9.21. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 48.18 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at SRTMUN was 9.21. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 44.33 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 22.81.
Analysing the past three years' cutoff, it is evident that the cutoff ranks saw a fluctuation over the years for MBA admission.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Shri Guru Gobind Singhji Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and learning but lacks management and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is at par, with hostels around average facilities. Wi-Fi is accessible everywhere on the campus, and the labs provide great student facilities. The quality of the food in the boys' hostel is not great, and campus food is better. The college's inclusion and motivation in sports is very good. Students also need to note that the hostel is based upon marks and admission category, and everyone might not get a hostel allotted. The other option is to live outside the campus in nearby PGs...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Mahatma Gandhi Mission's College of Engineering, NandedReviewed on 11 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, the worst faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good. The hostel is good, and the quality of food is nice. The sports faculty is not working and has some personal issues. In sports, there is no crowd, and you will get free Wi-Fi to use. There are 10 labs in the CSE, so there is no problem; you will get many chances.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Dnyanopasak College of Arts, Commerce and ScienceReviewed on 6 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: A decent choice for BCA students with good campus life.
reviews.review_text: College has a well-maintained campus with spacious classrooms. Along with computer labs, science labs, and Wi-Fi. A good library with sufficient academic books and journals. Laboratories are regularly updated. They are useful for practical learning. Campus environment is peaceful. It is suitable for studies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by R.E.S.'s College of Computer Science and Information TechnologyReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Tuition fee is affordable to pay.
reviews.review_text: The requests of students are taken into account immediately, but they provide solutions only after a long time by having frequent discussions about it. They are charging only a minimal tuition fee, as students from the native area, along with those from weaker sections, are applying.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Channabasweshwar Pharmacy CollegeReviewed on 4 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Life and learning at Channabasweshwar Pharmacy College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very well maintained, and there are a number of facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and garden. There are various hostels present in the surrounding of the college. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also good. Medical facilities are available in the college. Sports days are held in which cricket, volleyball, football, tennis, chess, etc., are played.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Shri Guru Gobind Singhji Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 27 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Average placements with a great campus and teachers.
reviews.review_text: College has very great infrastructure, like 9/10, almost every department provides Wi-Fi, classrooms are spacious, well-furnished, and clean. Speaking about the hostel, the first year hostel rooms are very bad ( 3/10 ), lack basic facilities, but since the second year onwards, the hostels are good too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shri Guru Gobind Singhji Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 10 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Guru Gobind Singhji Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available for this course are so good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are available for these course students. The quality and facilities of food in my college canteen are so tasty. Medicinal facilities are also available. Sports and games are also present.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by University Sub Center LaturReviewed on 1 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college in our Latur city.
reviews.review_text: I am not joining this college hostel and mess but I know that mess and hostel provide the best features for the students. Hostel also provided Wi-Fi, mess, lab, etc. This hostel was available. The mess and college hostel conducted a function for the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Rajarshi Shahu MahavidyalayaReviewed on 27 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Honest review of BCA at Shahu College.
reviews.review_text: There are mainly three buildings. The campus has 22 acres of land. This campus is in the main city near the bus stand. Hostels for both boys and girls are available. It costs nearly Rs 22,000 to Rs 25,000 per year. Hostel is moderate with double or triple sharing rooms. Wi-Fi is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Swami Vivekanand College of Pharmacy, UdgirReviewed on 19 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A well-equipped campus with supportive learning environment and scope for self-growth.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious, fully furnished, and equipped with necessary teaching aids. We have well-maintained, well-equipped laboratories that cater to practical learning needs. Campus offers high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity, which is accessible to students for academic purposes. Our library is quite large, with a vast collection of textbooks, reference materials, and journals. Additionally, there is a huge playground and sports facilities that support physical well-being and recreational activities...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Guru Gobind Singhji Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 12 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college SGGSIE&T Nanded.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for the Computer Science course at SGGS Nanded is decent. Department has well equipped labs Wi Fi enabled classrooms and access to a central library with good reference books and study material. Hostels have basic facilities and rooms are shared. Mess food is average but the canteen offers better options. Medical facilities are available on campus with a health center. Sports grounds are well maintained and students actively participate in football cricket badminton and indoor gam...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dayanand College of Law (DCL, Latur)
reviews.review_heading: It is good, but not good according to us.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but it's too old. The library staff is not good. The reading room is very bad. Major things are very bad here, but some things are good. According to students' goals, they can select this college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Shri Guru Gobind Singhji Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: SGGS Nanded is the unbeatable and upcoming IIT Nanded.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good; the hostel premises are clean and well-maintained. However, the hostel mess is subpar, and the food is somewhat hygienic but contains a lot of oil. On some days, the mess food is good. Overall, I can say that the mess food is worth the fee we pay, which is around 22000, and you won't get such facilities at a lower cost.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Institute of Technology and Management, NandedReviewed on 27 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Institute of Technology and Management excels in placements.
reviews.review_text: Our institute has a kitchen, a VIP hall, and a seminar hall. It also has computer labs, a library, and a housekeeping lab, where all the housekeeping practices should be done. My institute has a separate canteen where all students and staff consume their meals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Shri Guru Gobind Singhji Institute of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 22 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college for both enjoyment and career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good for studying. Wi-Fi is available full-time. The labs are clean and have all the necessary equipment.

Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 1,500 to register for PhD course at SRTMUN. Aspirants belonging to SC/ ST/ PwD categories have to pay an application fee of INR 1,200. Aspirants can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. Candidates must keep the fee receipt with them for future reference.

The SRTMUN provides diploma, undergraduate, and postgraduate programmes. The university provides courses in the Arts, Humanities, Social Sciences, Commerce, Computer Application and IT, Management and Business Administration, Engineering, and Architecture. faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Khalsa College of Pharmacy?

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Amritsar.

review_content.Placements: Nearly about 65 students are studying in our class. The highest salary offered was about Rs. 50,000 per month. Around 60% of the students get internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities are available at Khalsa College. There are good and big classrooms. There is a good library with all the books. We also have good labs. The hostels have good management. The food served in the mess is good and the medical facilities provided are also good.
review_content.Faculty: All the teachers are very helpful to students. The staff members are Ph.D. holders, and they have good knowledge about pharmacy. The course curriculum is relevant and trains students to be industry-ready. The semester exams are very difficult to pass out and the syllabus. The pass percentage is nearly about 90%.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharm. in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: College environment was very good, really good infrastructure with well qualified teachers.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students were placed. Good salary packages offered. Sun pharma, lupin, Sanofi are the top recruiters. All students got an internship. The environment of college was amazing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure with projectors in each class. Wi-Fi enabled library with access to many paid journals. Hostel infrastructure is amazing. The food quality of mess was good. The nature of hostel warden was frank. Medical facilities were available. The hostel has large ground. The college has a huge ground for sports events.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure was good. Facilities were limited.

review_content.Placements: Placement was good. College is also very cooperative towards the selection of the students. I am now working in one of the best Multinational companies and salary is also reasonable.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well, during the end of my graduation college started installing CCTV cameras. They didn't provide any superficial facilities such as wi-fi, sports, Air conditioner etc. But the labs and library was good as compared to other college.
review_content.Faculty: Only few teachers were helpful as many other were arrogant and partial. Due to some of the qualified teachers you see me commenting here. Otherwise we were like ship without sailor. Just because of them we learn many influential thing which surely help in future.

paragraphs: Khalsa College of Pharmacy admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Khalsa College of Pharmacy considers scores in GPAT, CBSE 12th, and PSEB 12th for admission to specific courses.Khalsa College of Pharmacyoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: They have a good facility in the classroom.

review_content.Placements: My college is not good but every year some companies come to recruit some students, who will hire students not by percentages which are very good. The role is offered high in the industry. They prefer only highly knowledgeable students who got a high percentage too.
review_content.Infrastructure: They have a good facility in the classroom, they are enough for 100 students per batch of the year. Wi-Fi is also available but only for official use. The hostel was near the college but the building was rented by someone else. Nowadays, the hostel food was good for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of K.K. College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placements in nearby local pharmaceutical companies. Internship programs are offered to few students. The recruiting companies are small-scale companies or industries that are nearby Chennai.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has big air-conditioned classrooms. The library is good but the lab facility is average. Our campus is small and doesn't have sports. The hostel is moderate at an affordable fee.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well qualified and teach in an understandable manner. The course curriculum doesn't make students ready for industry. The pass percentage is 80%. Semester examinations are conducted by studying a week before exams. The teaching quality is good.

review_summary.college_name: K.K. College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has really a good infrastructure and coaching.

content.Placements: Above 90% of students got selected for a job with a professional role. For the medical field, the salary will start from Rs. 20,000 per month I think, but once we get experience in that field, we will definitely get a good package. Most of the works are based on industry sectors like pharma companies, i.e., Sun Pharma, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college facilities are good. The infrastructure is also good for pursuing a degree. This college consists of almost 10 labs holding various subjects. The lab consists of different equipment to study. The hostel facility is good and the food is present in average taste. Sometimes at the cultural times, sports are conducted.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good place to learn. Here only the pharmacy courses are available.

content.Placements: I completed my studies in 2023. We were placed in good companies. Subjects were easy to learn with the help of well-qualified teachers, and we were placed in good companies to improve and gain knowledge about our professions. The experience was a must to reach higher levels. The salary started at Rs. 15,000, and with experience, we could reach up to 1 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were equipped with AC and digital screens, and they were maintained very well. Sports were not available. Labs were very good and had essential chemicals and things. In the canteen, only lunch and some additional side dishes were available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: They have a good facility in the classroom.

content.Placements: My college is not good but every year some companies come to recruit some students, who will hire students not by percentages which are very good. The role is offered high in the industry. They prefer only highly knowledgeable students who got a high percentage too.
content.Infrastructure: They have a good facility in the classroom, they are enough for 100 students per batch of the year. Wi-Fi is also available but only for official use. The hostel was near the college but the building was rented by someone else. Nowadays, the hostel food was good for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of K.K. College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placements in nearby local pharmaceutical companies. Internship programs are offered to few students. The recruiting companies are small-scale companies or industries that are nearby Chennai.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has big air-conditioned classrooms. The library is good but the lab facility is average. Our campus is small and doesn't have sports. The hostel is moderate at an affordable fee.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are well qualified and teach in an understandable manner. The course curriculum doesn't make students ready for industry. The pass percentage is 80%. Semester examinations are conducted by studying a week before exams. The teaching quality is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: More than 10 students got placements with salary packages ranging from 2.2 to 2.5 LPA. No student got internships because of Covid. Jobs are offered in the industry, IT sectors, research field, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College has better lab facilities, fully air-conditioned classrooms, and well-maintained library. Hostel food is not much good and also not worth the money. There is no playground which is a little drawback.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well educated. Exams are difficult. Around 95% of students clear all the exams by the end of 8th semester. Teaching quality is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It has really a good infrastructure and coaching.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are good. The infrastructure is also good for pursuing a degree. This college consists of almost 10 labs holding various subjects. The lab consists of different equipment to study. The hostel facility is good and the food is present in average taste. Sometimes at the cultural times, sports are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to learn. Here only the pharmacy courses are available.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were equipped with AC and digital screens, and they were maintained very well. Sports were not available. Labs were very good and had essential chemicals and things. In the canteen, only lunch and some additional side dishes were available.

reviews.review_heading: They have a good facility in the classroom.
reviews.review_text: They have a good facility in the classroom, they are enough for 100 students per batch of the year. Wi-Fi is also available but only for official use. The hostel was near the college but the building was rented by someone else. Nowadays, the hostel food was good for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of K.K. College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Our college has big air-conditioned classrooms. The library is good but the lab facility is average. Our campus is small and doesn't have sports. The hostel is moderate at an affordable fee.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College has better lab facilities, fully air-conditioned classrooms, and well-maintained library. Hostel food is not much good and also not worth the money. There is no playground which is a little drawback.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with good campus life and good laboratories.
reviews.review_text: This college provides new high-tech Wi-Fi, smart classrooms with complete air-conditioning, a laboratory with advanced equipment, and newly renovated laboratories. It also provides a decent library with enough space for study. It provides a decent hostel with food and facilities. The hostel fee was high as compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Really good pharmacy college with proper infrastructure and teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is far better than other pharmacy college in Chennai. In our college the classroom is fully furnished with AC and with the LED display for the smart class. Almost 100-120 students can sit in a single class room. The lab facilities is also very good with well good working equipments and well developed lab.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best pharma colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college is small, but it has a very good infrastructure and very good laboratories. A library and computer lab are available with a clean atmosphere. The hostel maintenance and food are not up to the mark. The campus is very neat and good. College buses are not available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best for pharma students and for students who want placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is very good, and its speed is very high. There are high-class laboratories where all the equipment is in the best condition. Classrooms have inbuilt projectors, and the library is awesome and highly air-conditioned. The hostel has a separate building, and it is cleaned every day, but the mess is not much good. The medical facility is available, and there is also a sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Not so bad and it's getting good comparatively.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel facility for male students is not up to the mark. A number of colonies nearby offer rooms for the students. And if you can afford it, the apartments are also found nearby for rent. However, all sharing PGs were more common among students.

review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers a range of facilities in both gaming and agriculture. It has good infrastructure WiFi access and several labs while the classrooms and library are of average quality. The hostel accommodations are pleasant and the food served is also good. review_summary.college_name: Bhupal Nobles University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: About 75% of the students got placed in our course. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest salary is 4 LPA. The hotels in our locality and many more companies and industries which are nearby our college. Many of the students get their internships from hotels and industries.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are available in our course like best classrooms, seminar hall, library, etc. The facility of hostel is also available at the college. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also very hygienic and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed. 10 LPA is the package offered. Zydus, Sun Pharma, and Scortis Pharma are the recruiting companies. 100% of students got internships in Zydus, Sun Pharma, and Scortis Pharma. In our college, most of the students like to go into quality control or production because it is the easiest job and it has the biggest role in the industry.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are very good, and all chemicals are available in labs. Students can practice from there easily. Our hostel is very good, and the view from the hostel is very beautiful. The food in a hostel is just like homemade food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 85 percent of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered ranges between 20 LPA - 25 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 5 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Almost 50 percent of students got internships in national companies. Top recruiting companies are TCS etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers a range of facilities in both gaming and agriculture. It has good infrastructure WiFi access and several labs while the classrooms and library are of average quality. The hostel accommodations are pleasant and the food served is also good. The canteen provides a variety of tasty options. This college offers more sports and games compared to other colleges in Udaipur and the medical facilities are satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: In the end, the college was good and you will find some good friends here.

content.Placements: In my course, many students get their placements through college. This course has a wide range of opportunities in foreign countries. Most of the students did their internships at Ananta Hospital Medical Institute and other hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel that is located is not so good. The washrooms are very dirty and have very less facilities. The food is also not so good. The college library is good. Classrooms are well-arranged. There are a variety of sports facilities in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The last point is that my college provides good knowledge but not placements.

content.Placements: My college offers the highest package of Rs. 25,000 to the batch toppers. Placement in my college is very poor, it is not helpful for the students.
content.Infrastructure: My hostel's infrastructure is very poor, it is ridiculous, and there is no cleanliness. The food is tasteless, and issues like alcohol and drug consumption, daily fights of seniors, ragging, and much more are happening in my hostel. I will be leaving my hostel as soon as my one year is complete, because I have fulfilled my feeling of hostel.

admission_overview.college_name: Bhupal Nobles University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Selection Process & Dates

paragraphs: Bhupal Nobles University offers UG, PG, Diploma and research programmes in the stream of Humanities & Social Science, Teaching & Education, Law, Medicine & Health Sciences, Arts, Accounting & Commerce, and Pharmacy. The University has multiple departments which are known as faculties offering 76 courses across 13 streams. BNU has over 30 experienced and highly qualified faculty members on its campus.

For Bhupal Nobles University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Bhupal Nobles University course admissions 2025:

Bhupal Nobles University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process for Bhupal Nobles University admissions 2025:
Step 1: Bhupal Nobles University Application Process 2025

Bhupal Nobles University admission process 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Bhupal Nobles University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Bhupal Nobles University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as JEE Main for the selection of respective courses. Furthermore, the university offers UG courses through its affiliated colleges. Admissions to UG courses are based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bhupal Nobles University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are available in our course like best classrooms, seminar hall, library, etc. The facility of hostel is also available at the college. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also very hygienic and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very good, and all chemicals are available in labs. Students can practice from there easily. Our hostel is very good, and the view from the hostel is very beautiful. The food in a hostel is just like homemade food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college offers a range of facilities in both gaming and agriculture. It has good infrastructure WiFi access and several labs while the classrooms and library are of average quality. The hostel accommodations are pleasant and the food served is also good. The canteen provides a variety of tasty options. This college offers more sports and games compared to other colleges in Udaipur and the medical facilities are satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: In the end, the college was good and you will find some good friends here.
reviews.review_text: The hostel that is located is not so good. The washrooms are very dirty and have very less facilities. The food is also not so good. The college library is good. Classrooms are well-arranged. There are a variety of sports facilities in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The last point is that my college provides good knowledge but not placements.
reviews.review_text: My hostel's infrastructure is very poor, it is ridiculous, and there is no cleanliness. The food is tasteless, and issues like alcohol and drug consumption, daily fights of seniors, ragging, and much more are happening in my hostel. I will be leaving my hostel as soon as my one year is complete, because I have fulfilled my feeling of hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Emphasis the quality of the academic programs offered at the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for a course or department can include classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and other spaces for learning and research. The quality and facilities in the hostel are amazing. They are well-deciplined. The food quality is good and maintaining hygiene in the mess and canteen. They provide all facilities. Sports are held on a higher level.

reviews.review_heading: The most significant college I seen.
reviews.review_text: There are separate hostels for boys and girls. There are also big grounds for playing outdoor games, and for indoor games, there is a very big hall available in our college campus. There are also 4 canteens in our college campus where all the fresh items are available.

reviews.review_heading: Finally this college is the best college in Udaipur.
reviews.review_text: In our course, there is a very peaceful environment in classrooms and throughout the whole institute. Labs are clean and have all facilities for practicals. In the hostel, rooms are clean and provide a peaceful environment. The mess and canteen are also good, but sometimes the food is not satisfactory. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available both in the hostel and in the institute.

reviews.review_heading: Good option for pharma sector but has more fees than any other college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at the college is good. Highly furnished labs and classrooms are there. Projector learning is also available. The library consists of huge amount of standard and reference books along with their editions. Indian pharmacopoeia is also available. The facilities at the hostel are above average as they provide almirah of large size and also separate building for pharmacy students. Food is the same at every mess not like home but still consumable. There is a big sports ground for all t...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bhupal Nobles' University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. No other university can compete with Bhupal Nobles' University in comparison to Infrastructure. Laboratories are available for each subject. Students can freely practice in laboratories. They have sufficient space in laboratories and sufficient accessories. There are 3 - 4 hostels in our college. The college provides separate hostels for girls and boys. There is a big ground available which is well-maintained and students play their favorite sports ...

reviews.review_heading: Bhupal Nobles' University is the best choice for doing BBA and MBA.
reviews.review_text: We had good infrastructure. There were huge classrooms and grounds. The infrastructure was also updated from time to time and we also had a computer lab, a library, and other facilities. Students interested in sports had a lot of infrastructure for sports development.

reviews.review_heading: College life and education are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classrooms is better, and the lab faculty are very good. There is no Wi-Fi connectivity on campus, but we enjoyed the classroom environment with good faculty. The hostel food is average in taste. There is also a canteen. There aren't many medical facilities in the hostel. But many sports and games are held here.

reviews.review_heading: The university is really good and people from abroad come to our college to study so I .
reviews.review_text: The amenities available at the college are really nice and affordable and the hostel charges start from 6000 per month. The food in the hostel is delicious and healthy. The amenities at the college are really nice. There is free Wi-Fi for students and teachers. Library cards are issued for the students and books are issued on its basis. The school is also part of the all India university games, every year more than 1000 students play nationals. The school cricket team has reached its the highest...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not good as they only care about getting fee from students.
reviews.review_text: Agriculture college doesn't have a separate building. Our classes were running in pharmacy college. Hostel is dirty. Students rooms are not checked for any suspicious activity. Warden doesn't care. All they care about is a fee. Once you pay the fee then you are on your own. Food doesn't have any taste or quality.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest that this college is best.
reviews.review_text: In the college one digital library and so many classrooms and there is no wi-fi facility and the classroom was not an air conditioner. There are so many different types of labs for Science students and this college is best for pharmacy. The hostel of the university is also well furnished.

college_info.college_name: Bhupal Nobles University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The Bhupal Nobles' University BA application fee is around INR 1,000. Candidates must submit the application form along with the application fee. Once the application form is submitted, candidates are shortlisted for further admission process. They must pay the BA course fee before on deadline and finalise their BA seats at the BN University.

The Bhupal Nobles' University BSc application fee is around INR 1,000. Candidates must submit the application form along with the application fee. Once the application form is submitted, candidates are shortlisted for further admission process. They must pay the BSc course fee before on deadline and finalise their BSc seats at the BN University.

Bhupal Nobles' University BPharma fee is INR 2.8 lakh. The BPharma tuition fee includes a time fee payment of INR 1,500. Also, candidates might have to pay a registration fee of INR 1,000. Further, to finalize BPharma seats, candidates must pay the course fee before the due date and get the receipt from the office. Students are required to present the fee receipt to the subject teacher/s to get their names enlisted in the respective class Attendance Register of the Subject Teacher.

To avail the Bhupal Nobles University scholarships, candidates must officially get admitted to the university's course. The university offers scholarships are merit based.  Students must fulfill certain criteria to be eligible for the scholarships which are as follows:

The flagship programmes offered at Baba Mast Nath University are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. fees_and_eligibility.overview: BMU - Baba Mast Nath University is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good university with good location in Delhi NCR.

review_content.Placements: 30% of our students are placed. Our college organized a large job placement fair in which other colleges are also invited. Where more than 150 companies participate. Good management has more than 1000 jobs for students, and it is a well-maintained state-level job fair.
review_content.Infrastructure: College building is very good with good management and development. It has large rooms for classes, labs, auditorium, and online daily attendance by fingerprint machines. Our hostel is also good with good food and maintains the timing of entry and exit.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Unsafe campus with zero discipline.

review_content.Placements: There isn't a concept of placement in the medical course, so no placements are there. But for other courses, students sit for placement. However, there are no actual placements at all. The college falsely claims to provide career opportunities, but not a single company visits for recruitment. Students are left to fend for themselves, often taking low-paying jobs unrelated to their field. There is no return on investment, just a certificate with no weight. The college offers no skill-building, no internships, and no industry exposure. It's better to choose a college that prepares you for the future.

faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

overview_faqs.question: Is BSc at Baba Mast Nath University a good choice?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BSc at Baba Mast Nath University is a good choice for students seeking admission in streams such as Pharmacy, Management, Law, Engineering, Science, etc. It is a private university and is also known as BMU Rohtak. The university is affiliated with the Shri Baba Mastnath Math, Ashtal Bohar, Rohtak and is recognised by the UGC. Further, the Baba Mastnath University Rohtak has also been approved by the Bar Council of India, Pharmacy Council of India, and Haryana State Council for Physiotherapy.

overview_faqs.question: Is Baba Mast Nath University under-rated?
overview_faqs.answer: No, Baba Masth Nath University is not a under-rated university. It is one of the renowned universities to offer quality education to students in the field of Engineering and is located in Rohtak, Haryana. The university is affiliated with the Shri Baba Mastnath Math, Ashtal Bohar, Rohtak and is recognised by the UGC. Some of the popular courses offered at BMU University Rohtak are BTech, BSc, BA, BAMS, BPharm, MBA, MTech, MA, etc. The university has a panel of guest lecturers to inspire students in their respective careers and to give them tips and invaluable insights in every course.

review_summary.college_name: Baba Mast Nath University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. L.L.B - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and environment.

content.Placements: About 20 to 30% of students are placed. Top recruiting companies were from Bahadurgarh and nearby areas. Overall, it is growing in terms of placement, yet some things need improvement. Alongside, there are very good faculty who will guide you through your career.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available. Though the food is average, the menu is wide, and recently, a gym will be introduced on the campus. There is a cafe on the campus. A lot of greenery and positive faculty members. Though it is not air-conditioned yet, it soon will be.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Computer Application(BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: BMU is average college in Rohtak.

content.Placements: BMU has a good placement record, and they give actual placement. BMU has tie-up with many companies like TCS, Wipro, etc. When you make a little effort, you gain a placement. Their placement ratio is also good, and they will also study for their placement.
content.Infrastructure: The hostal is not bed but only AC room is good in hostal. One bad thing in hostel is that the lift is not working properly, and many students get stuck in lift. Their building is also old. They do not renovate their room and building many types of areas facing the hostel like the gate is closed sharp 6:00 PM.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good university with good location in Delhi NCR.

content.Placements: 30% of our students are placed. Our college organized a large job placement fair in which other colleges are also invited. Where more than 150 companies participate. Good management has more than 1000 jobs for students, and it is a well-maintained state-level job fair.
content.Infrastructure: College building is very good with good management and development. It has large rooms for classes, labs, auditorium, and online daily attendance by fingerprint machines. Our hostel is also good with good food and maintains the timing of entry and exit.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Unsafe campus with zero discipline.

content.Placements: There isn't a concept of placement in the medical course, so no placements are there. But for other courses, students sit for placement. However, there are no actual placements at all. The college falsely claims to provide career opportunities, but not a single company visits for recruitment. Students are left to fend for themselves, often taking low-paying jobs unrelated to their field. There is no return on investment, just a certificate with no weight. The college offers no skill-building, no internships, and no industry exposure. It's better to choose a college that prepares you for the future.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with all the faculty members.

content.Placements: The students who got the degree from this college, their learnings were good. They were an educated and developed doctor. They also got jobs in a reputed hospital. The students also got jobs in teaching field like professor, acharya, and vaidya.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, there were anatomy lab, physiology lab, and panchkarma department. There was a library. In classroom, there was an AC as well as fans and projector. Hostel facilities were well and had tasty food with water cooler. The rooms were clean. There was study table also in the rooms.

The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG, PG and Certificate level in the field of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Teaching and Education and Nursing. faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: How can I take admission in Baba Mast Nath University?
faqs.answer: Baba Mast Nath University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts JEE Main, NEET, and HSTES etc. for admission to various courses. Baba Mast Nath University BMU offers courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels. To get admitted to Wisdom College for Creativity and Design, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college.
