hostel_campus.college_name: Baba Mast Nath University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description: The Library has a rich collection of 10000 publications including Books, journals, and reference material. The library has been housed in a well furnished and modern building.
The Library has a rich collection of 10000 publications including Books, journals, and reference material. The library has been housed in a well furnished and modern building.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Medical Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and environment.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available. Though the food is average, the menu is wide, and recently, a gym will be introduced on the campus. There is a cafe on the campus. A lot of greenery and positive faculty members. Though it is not air-conditioned yet, it soon will be.

reviews.review_heading: BMU is average college in Rohtak.
reviews.review_text: The hostal is not bed but only AC room is good in hostal. One bad thing in hostel is that the lift is not working properly, and many students get stuck in lift. Their building is also old. They do not renovate their room and building many types of areas facing the hostel like the gate is closed sharp 6:00 PM.

reviews.review_heading: Good university with good location in Delhi NCR.
reviews.review_text: College building is very good with good management and development. It has large rooms for classes, labs, auditorium, and online daily attendance by fingerprint machines. Our hostel is also good with good food and maintains the timing of entry and exit.

reviews.review_heading: Unsafe campus with zero discipline.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is really bad. There is no Wi-Fi. Labs are very outdated. The library also has outdated books. There are no standard books for the courses. The classrooms have minimal facilities. The projector was installed just last year after a protest.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with all the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there were anatomy lab, physiology lab, and panchkarma department. There was a library. In classroom, there was an AC as well as fans and projector. Hostel facilities were well and had tasty food with water cooler. The rooms were clean. There was study table also in the rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Well, the college is nice.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the department are not so good but whenever students need something that is provided by the department.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, really good faculty members and teachers, and nice facilities in the hostel.
reviews.review_text: Only theory, not practical. I also want to work on computers for language, and it is also a good course but not the university. The quality of the faculty members in the hostel is really good, and the quality of food is also available in the mess. They make really awesome food, and me and my friends always appreciate it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BMU - Baba Mast Nath University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. Classrooms are clean and well-painted. Labs are not very good. The library is not good. Books are available but are not very good. A canteen is available at this university. The hostel is good and new.

reviews.review_heading: BMU - Baba Mast Nath University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our college is overall good, and it has a multi-purpose playground in which activities are held during physio Fest. They also have a library section for physiotherapy students. The hostel is good with mess service providing good food.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on campus and hostel is quite good for our college. Proper labs, a library, good classrooms are provided to students. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is average. Some medical facilities and sports are provided to the students who are interested.

reviews.review_heading: My college review of Baba Mast Nath University.
reviews.review_text: This course is good. Wi-Fi is available in every department and the classes are clean. Labs are good too. You can get every equipment and perform experiments. The library is so good you can access to every book. The canteens food is kind okay there is no healthy option tho you can get chain, samosas.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are very good. The hostel provides good food. The hostel staff won't repeat the menu. Each room has two beds. The hostel provides a hot water facility in winter. It provides coolers during the summer. The girls' hostel is very safe. Guards are always at the gate. The hostel fee is Rs. 60,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good for B.A.M.S.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of BMU university is not so good as it is made in 1958 it is very old and the building is not good. No AC in classroom, no Wi-Fi in campus. Hostel building is also very old and not so good. There are no AC in hostel also. Mess food is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. The campus has lush greenery. Hostels are available for both boys and girls. You can take a 10-minute ride to Rohtak's main city center, where you enjoy and get all the required things.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The building is very attractive and strong. It has a big hall. Our classrooms are spacious. Parks are also available. It has a decent library. The infrastructure is very good. There is a canteen facility in our college. A playground is available for students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Madhya Pradesh Bhoj University (MPBOU Bhopal) offers PG, UG, certificate, diploma, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Science, Arts, and various other streams. At the UG level, the university offers three-year BBA, BCom, and other courses to students. At the PG level, the university offers a two-year MBA, MCA, and MA courses to students. The university also offers a Bachelor of Special Education (B.Ed. SEDE) and several other courses to students.

faqs.answer: A:    The accepted entrance exams at Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University are Karnataka PGCET, CUET, and others. For some courses, direct admissions are also available. overview_faqs.question: Is MPBOU Bhopal good?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MPBOU Bhopal is a good university. Bhoj University certificates and degrees are recognised by the UGC (University Grants Commission), DEB, AICTE, RCI, NCTE, and AIU. The university has a total of 612 study centres and 11 regional centres. Bhoj University MP is accredited with A Grade by NAAC (National Assessment and Accreditation Council).

overview_faqs.question: Why choose MPBOU Bhopal?
overview_faqs.answer: Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University (MPBOU Bhopal) was established in 1992 under the Madhya Pradesh University Act 1991. Bhoj University certificates and degrees are recognised by the UGC (University Grants Commission), DEB, AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education), RCI, NCTE, and AIU. The university has a total of 612 study centres and 11 regional centres. Hence, choosing this university is the best decision of students.

overview_faqs.question: How many schools of study are there under the MPBOU Bhopal?
overview_faqs.answer: Madhya Pradesh Bhoj University, through four schools of study, offers PG, UG, diploma, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Arts, and various other streams. The below-mentioned are the Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University schools of study:Madhya Pradesh Bhoj University Schools of StudySchool of IT and Basic ScienceSchool of Commerce and ManagementSchool of EducationSchool of Arts and Humanities--

admission_overview.college_name: MPBOU Bhopal Admission 2025: Application, Dates & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University is a public university located in Bhopal, India. MPBOU is a 1991 establishment, offering several UG and PG programmes. The university is best known for higher education through open and distance learning education.
Tabulated below is the eligibility criteria for respective courses:
Eligibility:Any UG degre
Eligibility:Any UG/PG degree
Eligibility:Class 12 with Science subjects
Eligibility:UG degree in Science stream
Eligibility:Any UG degree
Eligibility:Class 12
Eligibility:Any UG degree
NOTE:The eligibility mentioned above is General Eligibility

MP Bhoj fees include multiple components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, admission fees, identity card fees, and caution deposits (refundable). Some of the fee components are one-time payable. Tabulated below are the tuition fees for some of the popular courses of the institute:

Admission to MP Bhoj University distant and online courses is offered through the official website of the university. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria to secure a seat at the university and must apply through the official website of the University. Steps for the same is given below:
1: Application Process 2025
Application for MP Bhoj University can be applied to through the official website of the university.
2: Selection Rounds 2025

Following the completion of the application, fee payment, and entrance process, students can check their status using their registration number on the MP Bhoj admission status page. The university notifies students about admission confirmation or rejection through email and text messages within two months.

For other courses, admission forms submitted via the Online Admission System undergo a thorough examination and confirmation based on eligibility criteria. Processing is done region-wise on a first-come-first-serve basis, and the time required may vary by region. The university ensures that every student receives admission confirmation via email or the student portal within two months.
3: Admission Confirmation 2025
Once shortlisted, students receive notification from the university and are required to pay the course admission fee to secure their seat at MP Bhoj University.

placement_data.title: Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University (MPBOU) offers placements through its dedicated placement cell. The placement cell is responsible for offering internships and job opportunities to the students. It communicates with the students regularly and compiles information regarding the capabilities and potential of the students and sends it to interested organisations having job opportunities. The University has not released the placement report on its official website. However, some of the students have disclosed the placement data on Shiksha students' reviews. As per the reviews, about 60% of students get placed after the course completion. The highest package offered in recent MPBOU placements was INR 30 LPA . The average package ranged between INR 10 LPA and INR 20 LPA .

faqs.question: Does MPBOU have a placement cell?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University has a placement cell that takes charge of grooming students as per the industry needs. The cell provides guidance to students for professional and job-oriented courses about opportunities for jobs in industries/ business houses/ educational institutions/ organisations/ corporate houses/ private/ public sector companies. Many students of professional courses have paved their way to the leading firms throughout the country.

faqs.question: How to prepare for MPBOU placement interview for BEd?
faqs.answer: The first step of preparation for a school interview is to research well for the teaching position applied for. The important tips for BEd interviews during Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University placements are mentioned below: Prepare a well-structured resume enlisting your skills and achievement in the educational field Make a note of all the important topics of the particular subject you wish to teach Interviewer may ask a few questions on student handling. Note down a few points that elaborate your teaching skills from a parent and student point of view Study Curriculum and Syllabi guidelines by Central and State government How to bring technology to the classroom? E-learning is playing a vital role in the education industry. It is advised to prepare a few topics incorporating the technology usage in them

reviews.review_heading: I am in final year.
reviews.review_text: Learning experience has been good so far.

reviews.review_heading: Online B.Sc at Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University.
I think it is a good college for science students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good on a large campus. The library has all the books for research and study purposes. The canteen also has good-quality food, but it's quite expensive. Sports are not well supported here. Hostel is unavailable. The laboratories are in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is available in our college. Medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I  recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college are neither too good nor too bad, some good rooms have Wi-Fi facility and a library is also built. College which does not have hostel facility but food is available as there is a Dhaba and a hotel outside the college and there is also a canteen which is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There is no Wi-Fi facility, but classrooms are very good. It also provides a good library. Hostel facilities are average, and the food quality is better.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with less fees.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college. The number of libraries is very less, the hostel is available to some people and some people are not able to get it, there is a canteen outside the college, which is not from the college side, the medical facility is also fine.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and teachers are humble.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure was very good. The building was well-maintained. I was a day scholar, so I do not know about hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My suggestion is that the college is overall good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not available but the infrastructure and its course are very good. The water system is also fine because it has water. The building is also well-maintained. If this college comes under the government then it also gets some grants from the government so that its infrastructure becomes better.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Madhya Pradesh Bhoj Open University.
reviews.review_text: It provides a small library, but books are always available. Classrooms are excellent, and benches are good. Wi-Fi facility is also available. The college offers many cources, but I have chosen B.Com because my subject was commerce. We can get books by Bhoj office library with a fee of Rs. 3,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a really great infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: I don't know about the infrastructure of any course and hostel for students because I have chosen a private course in my subject. However, I came to know from my friends that our college has Wi-Fi facility, laboratory and library for all of the MPBOU students. Facilities are very nice here.

reviews.review_heading: The college helped me to get a degree.
reviews.review_text: Even it is an open university, so classes are not conducted regularly, but for examinations, it provides good facilities. There is no residential facilities for the students, neither mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports and games. However, it provides study material to students.

reviews.review_heading: Bhoj: The unique open university.
reviews.review_text: Bhoj University has a great infrastructure with all modern and the latest technology. The university full fills all necessities. The university has different blocks or infrastructure for all different departments like science, physics, biology, zoology, botany and much more.

reviews.review_heading: I am. Very good student of collage
Yese me unlogo Ke liye achha hai Jo job karte h or study bhi Kar rahe h …
reviews.review_text: Good

Mithibai College BSc students usually get job offers from companies like Cipla, KPMG, Wipro, etc. Mithibai College students participate in various clubs & organisations. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the overall experience and really nice for exposure.

review_content.Placements: Based on a bachelor's degree, as compared to BBA colleges, it's really nice. It's like a low-level MBA college that gives you an average package of around 7 LPA. They also have pre-placement talks and they train you for companies like TCS, Deloitte, Acies, and JP Morgan. They also provide very good internship opportunities from college that you can apply for and avail.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no college-provided hostel. The college has a nice infrastructure compared to other colleges. One thing is that there are multiple colleges in one building, which can sometimes feel frustrating. But overall, it's a nice infrastructure with good furniture, smart boards, a library area, and scanning to enter the college. Medical facilities are also there, along with a gymkhana for indoor games, Wi-Fi across the whole campus, and air-conditioned classrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Management Studies - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is the perfect college for a mixture of academics and social life.

review_content.Placements: Mithibai's placement cell is very strong. The strong alumni network also helps a lot, not only after graduation. Placements, but also for internships. The support and opportunities provided are great. The highest packages range between 12 and 20 LPA. According to the course chosen, the average package is around 6 LPA. The big four companies are Wipro, Infosys, Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, Mahindra and Mahindra, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have perfect classrooms with comfortable benches, sensory boards, fully air conditioned classrooms, IT labs, and a sports room. Girls common room, great washrooms, recreational rooms. Four clean canteens, a refreshing sitting area, benches to hang out or refresh mind, and a fully equipped and technology integrated library.

overview_faqs.question: Is Mithibai College of Arts a good college/ institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The Mumbai-based Mithibai College of Arts, Chauhan Institute of Science, and Amrutben Jivanlal College of Commerce and Economics is also known as Mithibai College of Arts. The college is affiliated with the University of Mumbai and has earned a "A" grade from the NAAC. Mithibai College presently provides UG and PG programmes in Arts, Science, and Commerce. Mithibai College has completed its 2023 placement campaign. According to the minimal information accessible on the official website, the highest package given was INR 10 LPA manufactured by Docsumo AI business. Soulflower Sanctuary, TCS, Dr Amin Controllers Pvt. Ltd., NeoSoft, and other well-known recruiters participated in Placements 2023.

review_summary.college_name: Mithibai College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A great college that can change your life.

content.Placements: Around 20-30% of the students got placements. Out of this most of the students get package of 4 LPA - 5 LPA, and the highest package is 13 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. We get companies like Deloitte, EY, Northstar, TCS, and many more. Overall, the placement process is good.
content.Infrastructure: We have well-structured classrooms and library. College campus is overall nice with plenty of space. Labs and libraries are available. The minus point is that it has no campus area and no hostel. But that is normal, keeping in mind that the college is in a very posh area.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Management and Finance - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Nice course, good faculty, and one of the top colleges in Mumbai, can go for it.

content.Placements: Placements are good, like you can accept an average salary of around 5-6 LPA, the highest package can go up to 12-15 LPA too, based on someone's skills and capabilities. Some of the top recruiting companies are JP Morgan, EY, Morgan Stanley, and other top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite good with ample seating benches with AC and fans. Wi-Fi is there, but speed is not that good, and library is also good with a good amount of books of every genre and subject, and borrowing and returning are all digitalised. As for hostel, there are no hostels, but there are 4 canteens with decent food and desserts.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the overall experience and really nice for exposure.

content.Placements: Based on a bachelor's degree, as compared to BBA colleges, it's really nice. It's like a low-level MBA college that gives you an average package of around 7 LPA. They also have pre-placement talks and they train you for companies like TCS, Deloitte, Acies, and JP Morgan. They also provide very good internship opportunities from college that you can apply for and avail.
content.Infrastructure: There is no college-provided hostel. The college has a nice infrastructure compared to other colleges. One thing is that there are multiple colleges in one building, which can sometimes feel frustrating. But overall, it's a nice infrastructure with good furniture, smart boards, a library area, and scanning to enter the college. Medical facilities are also there, along with a gymkhana for indoor games, Wi-Fi across the whole campus, and air-conditioned classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the perfect college for a mixture of academics and social life.

content.Placements: Mithibai's placement cell is very strong. The strong alumni network also helps a lot, not only after graduation. Placements, but also for internships. The support and opportunities provided are great. The highest packages range between 12 and 20 LPA. According to the course chosen, the average package is around 6 LPA. The big four companies are Wipro, Infosys, Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, Mahindra and Mahindra, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have perfect classrooms with comfortable benches, sensory boards, fully air conditioned classrooms, IT labs, and a sports room. Girls common room, great washrooms, recreational rooms. Four clean canteens, a refreshing sitting area, benches to hang out or refresh mind, and a fully equipped and technology integrated library.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is absolutely the best college and the campus. The crowd is amazing.

content.Placements: 86% of placements are successful in our college. The Big 4 companies are recruiting students for internship purposes. Approximately 75% of students from my course get placements. The accounting department is recruiting students from our college. The highest package is 36 LPA, and the lowest package is 16 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Mithibai College provides free Wi-Fi access to all students. A lab research facility is also available with inbuilt air-conditioning in all classrooms on our college campus. The library of Mithibai College is so clean and completely silent for students to focus on their studies.

paragraphs: Mithibai College admissions 2026are both meirit and entrance based. The college is also known as Mithibai College of Arts. This college is affiliated to theUniversity of Mumbai. Mithibai College has 1Degree& 1Junior College.

The Degree College has 3 main departments & 21 sub-departments. Through them, the college is offering 26 UG, 17 PG, & 7 PhD courses in the domains of Arts, Science, & Commerce streams. UG, PG, & PhD-level programmes are available at Mithibai Degree College. The streams include Arts, Commerce, Science, etc.Mithibai Collegeprogramme admissions areentrance-basedfor a lot of offered programmes.

Mithibai College fees include registration fee, alumni fees, uition fee, etc. Students should be able to pay the fee semester-wise. For fee concessions, students should contact the IIST admission office.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education easy but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Tabulated below are the fees and packages for some of the courses:
*This information is taken from the official website is flexible.

SVKM’S Mithibai College offers limited seats for its offered courses. The seats are provided once the admission is confirmed and candidates must pay the fee to confirm their seats. Candidates can refer to the following table for Mithibai College seats:
*This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

For admission to a course, students who meet the course-specific eligibility requirement can apply online on the official website. The seat allotment is carried out as per the selection criteria of the respective course. Candidates can refer to the following sections for details on the Mithibai College admission process.
1: Mithibai College Application Process 2026

Students seeking admission to UG and PG programmes must fill out the admission online (mithibai.ac.in). The online admission process at Mithibai College is in addition to the pre-admission registration process of the University of Mumbai. The application process involves registration, form filling, document upload, and fee payment. For some UG courses, admission is through CUET, hence, aspirants must complete theCUET application process.
2: Entrance Exam

Candidates who have registered for CUET need to appear for the exam in the subject of their choice and get a valid score. For PG programmes, candidates need to appear for the Mithibai CET exam. The college conducts this entrance exam in online mode.

3: Release of Cut off or Merit List
A selection list is released that mentions the names of the selected or shortlisted candidates. It is published on the university's official website.
4: Fee Payment & Admission Confirmation
After the final selection, candidates can pay the required fee to confirm their seat. The required amount to be paid shall be confirmed by the college admission office.

Students whose names appear on the merit list must report to the college to confirm their seats. For B.A., the admission cutoff percentage is 44.31. The rigorous cutoff also reflects its high demand among aspirants seeking admission at .

Mithibai College has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Mithibai College indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Mithibai College's rank is #17, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Arts', the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Mithibai College's rank is #12, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Commerce' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Mithibai College's rank is #7, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mithibai College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A great college that can change your life.
reviews.review_text: We have well-structured classrooms and library. College campus is overall nice with plenty of space. Labs and libraries are available. The minus point is that it has no campus area and no hostel. But that is normal, keeping in mind that the college is in a very posh area.

reviews.review_heading: Nice course, good faculty, and one of the top colleges in Mumbai, can go for it.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite good with ample seating benches with AC and fans. Wi-Fi is there, but speed is not that good, and library is also good with a good amount of books of every genre and subject, and borrowing and returning are all digitalised. As for hostel, there are no hostels, but there are 4 canteens with decent food and desserts.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the overall experience and really nice for exposure.
reviews.review_text: There is no college-provided hostel. The college has a nice infrastructure compared to other colleges. One thing is that there are multiple colleges in one building, which can sometimes feel frustrating. But overall, it's a nice infrastructure with good furniture, smart boards, a library area, and scanning to enter the college. Medical facilities are also there, along with a gymkhana for indoor games, Wi-Fi across the whole campus, and air-conditioned classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is the perfect college for a mixture of academics and social life.
reviews.review_text: We have perfect classrooms with comfortable benches, sensory boards, fully air conditioned classrooms, IT labs, and a sports room. Girls common room, great washrooms, recreational rooms. Four clean canteens, a refreshing sitting area, benches to hang out or refresh mind, and a fully equipped and technology integrated library.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely the best college and the campus. The crowd is amazing.
reviews.review_text: Mithibai College provides free Wi-Fi access to all students. A lab research facility is also available with inbuilt air-conditioning in all classrooms on our college campus. The library of Mithibai College is so clean and completely silent for students to focus on their studies.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college with the best college life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the college are A1, whether it be a library, classes, and smart boards. The canteen is also nice and affordable, but sometimes it is dirty. I don't have the experience of living in the hostel, so I will not be able to comment on that. There is a turf nearby where students play football.

reviews.review_heading: It is a top degree college in Mumbai. It is a joy to be graduated from this esteemed institution.
reviews.review_text: The college has more than 2 canteens on its premises that offer food at subsidised rates. Classrooms of the college are air-conditioned with projectors for giving presentations. The college is renovated from time to time. It also has a good gymkhana.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available for our course are very nice and amazing. Everything is neat and clean. Classrooms and library are fully centralized and provide facility of smart boards. There is also a Gymkhana where we can play indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is fixed that I want to take admission in Mithibai College. I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided for our course are very nice and amazing. Facilities provided by the college are centralized AC classrooms with smartboards, a library, and a gymkhana where we can play indoor games. There are many canteens, and the quality and taste of the food are very nice.

reviews.review_heading: I like their facility behaviour they were very friendly.
reviews.review_text: Having a site annual function with the name of the college in which we used to select interested students to perform in front of our seniors and faculty members for enjoyment, we held this program. Almost every game is included for sports days, excluding a few of them that need to be added on.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with best placements and good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The library is even better than the classrooms for self study. The canteen serves good food at a reasonable price. There are lots of sports and games opportunities for capable athletes. If a student is injured, the college has good medical facilities to help them recover quickly.

reviews.review_heading: Mithibai: a good path for your graduation journey.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities in our college are quite good, having spacious, air-conditioned classrooms, a big library, and projectors in the classroom. It has nice canteens having affordable, tasty food options.
The one drawback is Mithibai College does not have a hostel of its own, so you need to rent a PG for accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: I think the college is very nice and fun, and enjoyable. You can study in the library and have fun o
reviews.review_text: Mithibai is known for its college infrastructure. The college is huge and has a lot of space to hang out and stuff. There are 3 libraries, 4 canteens, computer labs, research labs, and places where you can sit and chill. The college is very clean too. There are many lifts. Every floor you visit there is something new to see. The AC is good and there is a gymkhana.

reviews.review_heading: Honest Mithibai College Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college provides a suitable place for all the courses to take place within the building. Though the building is small and there's a large number of students in it, it's quite congested. Although, the best part of the college is the canteen. The food is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mithibai College of Arts, Chauhan Institute of Science.
reviews.review_text: I do not stay in the college hostel, so I don't know much about it. The infrastructure is very well-organised with all facilities provided to students. We lag only for the campus for outdoor sports. Some of my friends live in the hostel, and they gave a good review about it.

college_info.intro:
Some of the popular programmes offered at RIMT University include BTech and MTech. For BTech admissions, students must have passed Class 12 exam with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one among Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students) in all subjects taken together.
On the other hand, for MTech course, students must have a bachelor’s degree in Engineering or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of reserved category candidates). Students can check the RIMT University popular programmes in the table provided below:

placements.overview: At RIMT University, the dedicated takes charge of all placement-related matters for students across departments. Students can check the in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    The placement at the Regional Institute of Management and Technology University is generally better for MBA students compared to BTech students. As per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024, the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA, respectively. Hence, the placement package offered to MBA graduates is slightly higher than the BTech course. However, according to the reports, the number of BTech student
faqs.question: Which has better placement at RIMT University, BTech or MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The RIMT university's placement cell is said to be cooperative and has a decent placement rate. Further, the university claimed that it has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Management NIRF reports 2024  the median package offered during RIMT University MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.57 LPA. However, to be very precise there is no such thing as a 100% placement guarantee, students can get placement opportunities from the university'
faqs.question: Does RIMT University provide 100% placements for MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    RIMT University has a placements cell that takes charge of all placement-related matters for students across Management departmentt. The cell aims to align recruiter expectations with the aspirations of MBA students, ensuring a mutually beneficial placement experience. Some of the top recruiters, mentioned at RIMT University's official website are: Bajaj Capital Bank of America Amazon Pay IBM Tata Consultancy Services HDFC Bank
faqs.question: Which companies recruits MBA graduates from RIMT University?

The cell aims to align recruiter expectations with the aspirations of BTech students, ensuring a mutually beneficial placement experience. fees_and_eligibility.overview:
RIMT University offers over 250 UG, PG, diploma and doctoral courses to the students across various fields such as Engineering, Science, Management, Agriculture, Design, Pharmacy, Health Science, Education, Arts and Humanities, Computer & IT and Commerce & Accounting, among others. For admission, candidates are required to meet with the minimum eligibility criteria set by the University.

Majority of the UG courses have a duration ranging between three to five years and for most of the PG courses, the duration is two years. Students can check the RIMT University courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:     College is charging genuine fees for all courses they provides. College fees for B.Tech is 1.11 Lacs (for 1 st year), B.Sc is 1.04 Lacs (for 1st year), MBA is 1.02 Lacs (1st year fees), Diploma -1.34 Lacs (1st year).Fees of this college is very normal for every course, you can choose this as a option according to fees.College placement is little bit lower, as only 60% of the students gets placement from this college.You can directly took admission in this college .Only for B.Tech, you need more than 60% in 12th boards
faqs.question: How costly is RIMT University?

faqs.answer: A:    Hello Nishar Ahmed, this private University established almost 25 years ago in 1998 at a place called Mandi Gobindgarh in Punjab,  is quite popular among students of Northern India. For seeking admission in MBA of 2 years in this university, the requirements are quite simple or normal. A student needs to obtain his degree with 50% aggregate marks and also 12th with 50% of aggregate marks. This university accepts ranking or scoring in any of the different management entrance exams conducted in India like MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT or GMAT. You can get insights into the admission process for not only this course but there are plenty of other Management courses after graduation in this university, via link that I am attaching below:-https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/admissionBest wishes to you.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is required for MBA at RIMT University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, you can easily took admission in this college. As this is a private college, there are lot of seats available .But for B.Tech you should have given JEE Mains with more than 45% in 12th boards exams.For B.Com, students need 50 % in commerce stream in 12th boards.For BCA, just any students who have completed thier 12th boards can took admissions.College accepts Cbse 12th as well as PSEB 12th .Contact to the college offline or else register your details on their website, you can easily get a seat in this college
faqs.question: Is RIMT University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. To complete the application, candidates need to visit the university's official admission portal, where candidates have to register with their personal email ID and mobile number.This fee is a crucial part of the application process and is required to finalise aspirants' submission.
faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.A at RIMT University?

reviews_list.review_title: A brief review of RIMT University.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed from our course. The highest package offered was about Rs. 80000 per month in our course. Recruiting companies are diagnostic centers. Around 100% of students secured internships in different hospitals in their areas.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure like best furniture, 24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.

review_content.Placements: Very few placements are provided by this university. This university offers less exposure, but it provides various industrial visits, which may help you get placed independently. There are many extracurricular activities that students should be involved in for overall development.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: RIMT University is the best university in India.

review_content.Placements: There were at least 40% placements which happened on the campus earlier, so that was just a beautiful initiative that took place on the campus. So the highest packages were - 2 lakhs LPA, low packages were like 1 lakh. Roles given by the company were operation theatre technician as well as anesthesia management.
review_content.Infrastructure: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

faqs.answer: NTA released the re-revised scorecard on July 26, 2024. In this scorecard, the score has been revised as per the Supreme Court verdict of removing the bonus marks awarded earlier for the controversial Physics question, and deducting one mark from those who marked incorrect answer options. The city and centre-wise result data such as number of candidates appeared and scores obtained, by masking candidates' personal data was released on July 21, as per the Supreme Court order given on the hearing dated July 18, 2024. The NEET 2024 result for the re-exam, which was conducted on June 23, was declared on July 1, day day after the slated date. The final answer keys for the NEET 2024 re-exam was released by June 30, ahead of the result declaration. Earlier, the result of NEET 2024 was declared by NTA on June 4, 2024, 10 days ahead of the original schedule, which was June 14, 2024. NTA released the final NEET answer keys on June 4, prior to the release of the NEET result 2024. The NEET result was declared in an online mode. Candidates have to log in with their registration credentials or application number and date of birth, and download their scorecard in PDF format. NTA also released the merit list containing the name, Roll Number, All India Rank and Percentile of the candidates. Along with the NEET 2024 scorecard, NTA also released the NEET 2024 cutoff marks or the qualifying marks/scores.
faqs.question: Q: When did NTA release the NEET 2024 result?

overview_faqs.question: How costly is RIMT University?
overview_faqs.answer: College is charging genuine fees for all courses they provides. College fees for B.Tech is 1.11 Lacs (for 1 st year), B.Sc is 1.04 Lacs (for 1st year), MBA is 1.02 Lacs (1st year fees), Diploma -1.34 Lacs (1st year).Fees of this college is very normal for every course, you can choose this as a option according to fees.College placement is little bit lower, as only 60% of the students gets placement from this college.You can directly took admission in this college .Only for B.Tech, you need more than 60% in 12th boards

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.A at RIMT University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. To complete the application, candidates need to visit the university's official admission portal, where candidates have to register with their personal email ID and mobile number.This fee is a crucial part of the application process and is required to finalise aspirants' submission.

For B.A . 15 courses is available with total tuition fees 1.4 L-3.1L and for BPT is 4.2L.10 courses are in BBA and tatal fees for this course is 2.9L-4.2L.You can see fee structure for more courses at https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/courses

review_summary.college_name: RIMT University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college and day by day, they are improving the quality of the college.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students were placed in my course. The lowest package was 4.1 LPA and the highest was 7.1 LPA. Almost 90% of students got internships in my course. Supervisor and manager roles were provided to the students, and many students got posts in the same college after getting a good degree from the same college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and a library were available. Good hostels and good food were served there. Many activity areas were available. RO water was available. ACs and coolers were also available. A good internet connection was set up for us so we could study well. Every class projectors were placed.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My best college in the world.

content.Placements: Above 50 students were placed in my course. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 4 LPA. All top companies like Intel, and so many local companies hired students. 50% of students got internships at Intel. Role offered was a corporate lawyer in a firm.
content.Infrastructure: College provided all necessary facilities to students like free Wi-Fi, computer and science labs, proper classrooms, and different libraries for every department. Hostel provided healthy food to the hostler. It also provided good rooms and washrooms for all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology (MRIT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A brief review of RIMT University.

content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed from our course. The highest package offered was about Rs. 80000 per month in our course. Recruiting companies are diagnostic centers. Around 100% of students secured internships in different hospitals in their areas.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure like best furniture, 24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.

content.Placements: Very few placements are provided by this university. This university offers less exposure, but it provides various industrial visits, which may help you get placed independently. There are many extracurricular activities that students should be involved in for overall development.
content.Infrastructure: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: RIMT University is the best university in India.

content.Placements: There were at least 40% placements which happened on the campus earlier, so that was just a beautiful initiative that took place on the campus. So the highest packages were - 2 lakhs LPA, low packages were like 1 lakh. Roles given by the company were operation theatre technician as well as anesthesia management.
content.Infrastructure: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

admission_overview.college_name: RIMT University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: RIMT University has 21 schools that offfer various UG, PG, diploma and PhD programmes in a wide range of specialisations like Management, Health Sciences, Engineering, Computer Science, etc. RIMT University admission 2025 is ongoing for all the courses. Candidates can visit the official webiste of the University and register for the selected course for further admission process. The University considers merit as well as entrance test scores for admission to different courses.
The table below mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for popular RIMT University courses:

A pass in Class 12 exam with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one among Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students) in all subjects taken together
A pass in Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any stream

Those candidates who have passed their Class 10 along with a three-year Diploma in any trade from Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training, Chandigarh or such Examination from any other recognised State Board of Technical Education
Merit-basis
A pass in Class 12 with 50% aggregate from Commerce stream
Merit-basis
A bachelor’s degree in Engineering or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of reserved category candidates)
A pass in BCom with at least 50% aggregate
A pass in any bachelor’s degree of minimum three-year duration from a recognised university
CAT/MAT/CMAT
A pass in Class 10 (or Class 12 for some specialisations) with 50% aggregate
Merit-basis

faqs.question: When did NTA release the NEET 2024 result?
faqs.answer: NTA released the re-revised scorecard on July 26, 2024. In this scorecard, the score has been revised as per the Supreme Court verdict of removing the bonus marks awarded earlier for the controversial Physics question, and deducting one mark from those who marked incorrect answer options. The city and centre-wise result data such as number of candidates appeared and scores obtained, by masking candidates' personal data was released on July 21, as per the Supreme Court order given on the hearing dated July 18, 2024. The NEET 2024 result for the re-exam, which was conducted on June 23, was declared on July 1, day day after the slated date. The final answer keys for the NEET 2024 re-exam was released by June 30, ahead of the result declaration. Earlier, the result of NEET 2024 was declared by NTA on June 4, 2024, 10 days ahead of the original schedule, which was June 14, 2024. NTA released the final NEET answer keys on June 4, prior to the release of the NEET result 2024. The NEET result

faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, this private University established almost 25 years ago in 1998 at a place called Mandi Gobindgarh in Punjab,  is quite popular among students of Northern India.For seeking admission in MBA of 2 years in this university, the requirements are quite simple or normal. A student needs to obtain his degree with 50% aggregate marks and also 12th with 50% of aggregate marks. This university accepts ranking or scoring in any of the different management entrance exams conducted in India like MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT or GMAT.You can get insights into the admission process for not only this course but there are plenty of other Management courses after graduation in this university, via link that I am attaching below:-https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/admissionBest wishes to you.

placement_report.college_name: RIMT University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: RIMT University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The overall highest package offered during RIMT University placements stood at INR 30 LPA . Further, RIMT University has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024 , the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to the NIRF report 2023, 46 BTech and 7 MBA students were placed during RIMT University placements 2022. Further, the median package offered to BTech and MBA students during 2022 placements was INR 2.2 LPA and INR 2.04 LPA, respectively. Earlier, the highest package offered during RIMT University placements 2021 stood at INR 43 LPA . Moreover, more than 600 companies visited the campus during RIMT University placements 2021.

The university has released the Engineering and Management NIRF report 2023 that incorporates 2022 placement statistics for respective courses. Click on the below link to download the RIMT University placement data 2022:

faqs.question: How is the BPharm placements at RIMT University?
faqs.answer: RIMT University BPharm placement data has not been declared by the University. However, according to the placement NIRF data for the year 2024, the RIMT University BPharm median package offered ranges from INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA . Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What are students opinion on BPharm placements at RIMT University?
faqs.answer: According to the verified Shiksha review , the BPharm students, and alumni of RIMT University describe the BPharm placements as good and well-maintained. Candidates can check some of the reviews below: Review 1: "Almost 100% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered is INR 67,600 per month. Almost 100% of students got internships from our course in many companies". Review 2: "Almost 90% of students are placed in our college. The highest salary offered is Rs.55,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is INR 20,000 per month. About 80% of students got internships. All types of courses and good offers are provided on the RIMT campus". Review 3: " B pharmacy is a professional course of four years it is a very good course I am having a great experience There are almost 80 students in my batch the highest package- is INR 3-4 LPA. The lowest package is INR 1.5-2 LPA The internship facilities are also very good many multinational companies came across our college for internships like Sun Pharmaceutical, etc.". Conclusively, students expressed their satisfaction towards the BPharm placements conducted by RIMT University. However, there may be some variation in placement outcomes depending on the year and batch of students.

faqs.question: Which has better placement at RIMT University, BTech or MBA?
faqs.answer: The placement at the Regional Institute of Management and Technology University is generally better for MBA students compared to BTech students. As per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024 , the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA , respectively. Hence, the placement package offered to MBA graduates is slightly higher than the BTech course. However, according to the reports, the number of BTech students placed is more than the number of graduates placed from MBA courses.

faqs.question: Does RIMT University provide 100% placements for MBA?
faqs.answer: The RIMT university's placement cell is said to be cooperative and has a decent placement rate. Further, the university claimed that it has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Management NIRF reports 2024 the median package offered during RIMT University MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.57 LPA . However, to be very precise there is no such thing as a 100% placement guarantee, students can get placement opportunities from the university's side but, qualifying for the interview rounds, and skills & aptitude test are completely based on students, how they perform in that. Hence, the university is claiming that they offer 100% placements to their MBA students but, to get a job students must prepare themselves.

hostel_campus.college_name: RIMT University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Rimt provides on-campus accommodation. All rooms are fully furnished; include utilities, Wi-Fi internet connection and meals which are prepared in-house by a chef. The usual dining schedule from Monday to Saturday comprises full breakfast, lunch and dinner, paid laundry facilities are also available. Students get a study desk and chair, chest of drawers, wardrobe, washbasin, and more. There are also adapted rooms in the halls for students with disabilities. Students also have access to computer labs, fitness centres, and swimming pools.

infrastructure of Rimt university is good but according to me, it can be better if they painted all the departments There are many departments and hostels which are not fully made and painted 
Hostel facilities are not so good, but they can also be better.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure at Rimt and the design.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life in Rimt University is very good. The food quality is mid-range, and the menu of the mess is nearly updated every day. The canteen food is better, and medical as well as sports and other extracurricular activities are also available for the students residing in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment, excellent teaching, and best placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course are good, like the library, which helps students with their respective subjects. And the classroom is well maintained, cleaned, and decorated. The quality of the hostel is average because in hostels there are hygiene problems that affect students health. And the food quality is average; they provide good food to the students, but some of the students complain that the food is bad for their health. So yes, this is the reason for giving an average rating to the hostel ...

reviews.review_heading: College is normal and the fees is high.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good. It is average. The classes are not well developed. They are average like high schools. Hostels are very bad. Mess facility and washrooms are very bad. The rooms are not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a top-level university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our classrooms are neat. Our labs are good and decent. The food served in the mess is good and hygienic. Our university has a hospital. Our college has many sports grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for engineering students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best facilities in the hostel room for students. Wi-Fi facility is available at high speed in our hostel rooms. There is an RJ-45 connector installed for hostelers. The food served in the mess is good compared to other colleges.

college_info.college_name: RIMT University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. To complete the application, candidates need to visit the university's official admission portal, where candidates have to register with their personal email ID and mobile number.This fee is a crucial part of the application process and is required to finalise aspirants' submission.
College is charging genuine fees for all courses they provides.
College fees for B.Tech is 1.11 Lacs (for 1 st year), B.Sc is 1.04 Lacs (for 1st year), MBA is 1.02 Lacs (1st year fees), Diploma -1.34 Lacs (1st year).
Fees of this college is very normal for every course, you can choose this as a option according to fees.
College placement is little bit lower, as only 60% of the students gets placement from this college.
You can directly took admission in this college .Only for B.Tech, you need more than 60% in 12th boards
The RIMT University is UGC-approved and is accredited by the AICTE, Bar Council of India, Pharmacy Council of India, and Council of Architecture for its wide range of courses.
Fees for various courses offered as follow-ups:
For B.Sc. it offers 43 courses with the total tuition fees 2.8 L- 4.7 L and for M.Sc. it offers 33 courses total tuition fees for this course ranges from 1.4 L- 3.5 L.
4 courses are in B.Pharm with the total tuition fees 3.5L-5L And for B.E/B.Tech the fees is 3.7L-6.4L.
Total tuition for UG Diploma is 39k - 1.4L and for BA.LL.B it is 5.3L .
For B.A . 15 courses is available with total tuition fees 1.4 L-3.1L and for BPT is 4.2L.
10 courses are in BBA and tatal fees for this course is 2.9L-4.2L.
You can see fee structure for more courses at https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/courses

college_info.intro:
Starex University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The university gives a BTech programme in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, CSE, Cyber Security & Digital Forensics, Cyber Security, Azure Data, Cloud & AI Developer, and others. It is a full-time, four-year programme, spanning over 8 semesters. BTech students can work as Database Administrator, Software Developer, Data Scientist, Cyber Security Analyst, and others.
Starex University offers a two-year MBA programme. The MBA curriculum offered at the university includes case studies, industry projects and internship opportunities for the students. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Finance Managers, Marketing Research Analysts, Business Analyst, Investment Banker, and others. Below are some of the programmes offered by Starex University:

reviews_list.review_title: College gives the best experience.

overview_faqs.question: Does Starex University follow semester pattern for MBA programme?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the DPharma course at Starex University follows the semester pattern. It offers DPharma with a two-year course duration where the students complete the coursework in more than one Pharmatics discipline. However, there are two semesters in an DPharma academic year, and therefore systematic learning and assessments are smoothly run throughout. A semester-wise format offers students the added ability to handle workloads in the semesters of the DPharma programme.

review_summary.college_name: Starex University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Radio and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I think there are no good placements here. I did not see or hear from any student about this.

content.Placements: A very few students attend the college regularly. Teachers do not come to the classroom. Students go for internships at their own risk. The college treats internships as a very last option, because it seems like the paramedics course is a waste in this college.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in classes or labs, and the classrooms are not cleaned properly. It is cleaned only once a week. It is in very poor condition, with a school-type desk, and there is no proper seating at the desk. It is very painful, I daily think why I should go to college or waste money, one should opt for this college at their own risk.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (AI & ML) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Pretty decent college with good infrastructure and average placement ratio.

content.Placements: The placement ratio of Starex University is not very good; maybe 2 out of 10 students get placed on average. The highest package is somewhere around 10 LPA, and the average is 3.6 LPA. Most of the students are hired by new startups and some of the MNCs like Wipro, TCS, etc. The internship ratio is very low; 1 out of 10 get a paid internship here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decently good at Starex University. It gives a foreign university vibe. Classrooms and the library are well-maintained, and no Wi-Fi is allowed for students. The hostel is also decent with all the required facilities. The hostel warden is very good and supportive.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good until we talk about placements.

content.Placements: Only, on average, 20% of students get placed. The highest package is around 320000 and the lowest package is 120000. Companies like Cipla, Medicament, etc. are the top recruiters. 60 to 70 percent students get internship in various companies like Medicament, etc. Roles offered are quality control, analysis, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our department, like WiFi, labs, classrooms and libraries. Our classroom has ACs. The hostel facility was also good; the food was not bad. On our campus, we have a hospital so medical facilities are available 24 hours a day. All types of sports are available in our college like football, cricket, etc.

content.Placements: The placement process starts with NASSCOM, which has a tie-up with the University, providing perfect training for placements. Once we train and reach the final year, placements start with big firms like Accenture, IBM, Merkle, Seagate, Deloitte, and Amazon conducting campus interviews. The salary package is different for all companies, with the highest being 15 LPA and the average being 5-6 LPA. In our batch, the college did not provide internships. They tried their best; maybe they can start internships from this year. Roles depend on the company.

individual_reviews.course: Master in Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Previous year, 80% of students were placed in various companies.

content.Placements: For us (MBA ) end of 2nd semester we are eligible for placement drives but for a job after 3rd semester is complete the college will grant permission to join the job and also have an opportunity for an off-campus drive. Around 15 to 18 companies visited our college and around 75 to 80 percent of students got placement. Our courses the highest package is 14 lac and our course average package is around 5 lac. Some of the students make startups and join the jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Modern hostel facilities are provided separately for both boys and girls of the college. The rooms at the hostel have basic facilities and are fully furnished with furniture that helps the students to study and live there peaceful. The entire hostel is Wi-Fi enabled and has 24 into 7 electricity and water supply. Feels for the hostel are as follows- For AC rooms, single-sharing rooms cost around 1.3 Lacs per year. Twin sharing 1.2 Lacs per year. Triple sharing 1.1 Lacs per year. For AC rooms, twin sharing is 1 Lacs per year, and for triple sharing, it is 90000 per year.

admission_overview.college_name: Starex University Course Admissions 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Selection, Application Process, Placements

paragraphs: Starex University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the test or personal interview round to get admission in UG or PG programmes.Starex Universityoffers more than 48 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The university offers courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Commerce, etc. Interested candidates can fill out the application form online.

The university offers courses in full-time mode through 12 schools. BPharm, BTech and MBA are some of the popular courses offered by the university. Below are the key highlights forStarex University admissions:
Particulars
Starex University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
https://www.starexuniversity.com/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
Starex University Course Details

The university offers admission based on a test or personal interview round. Candidates need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below are popularStarex University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Starex University opens the registration portal as a first step of the admission process. Candidates are first required to apply for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: Starex University Application Process 2025

Candidates need to apply for the course of their choice via online mode. Aspirants will need to register with the basic details to generate the login credentials. Candidates have to pay an application fee to register for a course at Starex University.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the application process is completed, the university starts selecting candidates for admission. The selection is based on test scores or performance in the personal interview round. Based on performance in the selection rounds, aspirants become eligible for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

After the final selection is over, candidates are informed by mail or call by the authorities. These students then need to get their documents verified and pay the admission fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University offers a two-year MBA programme divided into four semesters. The university offers MBA in Business Analytics with academic support by IBM and Data Pioneers -Azure Ascendancy with academic support by Microsoft. Aspirants must complete bachelor's degree of a minimum of three-years with at least 50% aggregate to apply for MBA course.To know more about an MBA programme,click here.

faqs.question: What are the cutoff marks required for MBA?
faqs.answer: The cutoff marks for the MBA for the general category will go around 97 to 100 percentile in the CAT Exam. This is for the top colleges IIM Calcutta, Ahmedabad etc.The minimum you need to score is 90 percentile to get admission to other colleges for MBA. It depends on the college and number of seats they are offering.

faqs.question: Can I join STAREX University directly?
faqs.answer: Starex University offers admission to UG and PG courses based on a test conducted by the university. The university also conducts a personal interview round for selection. Aspirants are first required to apply for their preferred course and then participate in the selection rounds for admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University eligibility criteria varies course-wise. Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility criteria for top Starex University courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with PCM as compulsory subjects with at least 45% aggregateMBABachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years with at least 50% aggregateBPharmClass 12 with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects and Biology/ Mathematics with at least 45% aggregateBCAClass 12 with at least 45% aggregateBAClass 12 with at least 45% aggregate

faqs.question: Are admissions at STAREX University entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Starex University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the test or personal interview round to get admission in UG or PG programmes. After final selection is over, candidates are informed by mail or call by the authorities. The shortlisted candidates then need to come for document verification and pay the admission fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBA and what is the minimum University Entrance Exam percentage required?
faqs.answer: For the selection process for an MBA degree:You must have secured 50% in your bachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years. For the Reserved category, it is 45%.For admission, you must have cleared any national-level exam like the CAT or you can opt for an entrance exam done by the university.After clearing the exam you will get a call for an interview. You will get admission only after clearing the interview.Entrance test weightage is 60% while for an interview it is 40%.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BCom degree at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who are pursuing their BCom degree from Starex University can apply to any government job. They can look forward to placements related to Finance, Auditing, Financial Administration, Taxation, etc. For most of the government jobs, graduates are required to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations. Tabulated below are some prospective government jobs for BCom graduates along with their average salaries: Bank Probationary Officer (PO): INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk: INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC: INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO: INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salary package are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may vary.

college_info.college_name: Starex University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Tution fee for B.Sc. i STAREX University is around 1.6L-3.9L, with the total including some more such as examination fees (and as per one's requirements) hostel and mess fees, with the average number going around 1.2L Per year for many students.So you must look at the expenses individually to decide whether you would have to spend some money there or not.

The fee for the Starex University Gurgaon MBA course is INR 3 lakh. This course fee is calculated on the basis of first-semester fees and includes components such as tuition fees. The candidates availing of the hostel facilities have to pay the hostel charges as well, which sums up to INR 2.25 lakh. In addition, the mentioned hostel fee is for Non-AC (3-Sharing) plus the security charges. At the time of application form filling, aspirants have to pay the application fee as well to submit the form successfully.

STAREX University is moderately costly if we see other factors side by side. The B.Tech fees at this University is around INR 3.2 lakh- 4.8 lakh and the MBA fees is also around INR 3 lakh. It can be said that the fees in not too much expensive but is expensive. Other colleges charge less fees than this as offer better ROI than this university. The average package offered is INR 10 LPA and average is INR 3 LPA. Seeing the return on fees invested, it's okay. So if  a student is trying to pursue any course from this university he/she should consider other factors also such as Facility, Infrastructure etc. and feedback from current students should also be taken.

The fee for all the various courses at the Starex university varies greatly depending upon the duration and specialisation of the program. Tution fee for MBA is around 3L Tution fee for MCA is around 1.4L Tution fee for B.Sc. is around 1.6L-3.9L Tution fee for B.Pharma is around 3L Tution fee for BPT is around 3.2L Tution fee for M.Sc. is around 1L-1.6L Tution fee for B.E./B.Tech is around 3.2L-4.8L
just to give some insights, One must look at official recent sources too as the values might change from time to time.

placements.overview: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Dental NIRF report 2024 has been released. The median package offered during BDS and MDS Amrita School of Dentistry placements 2023 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 17 LPA, respectively.
