admission_process.title: Amrita School of Dentistry Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Amrita School of Dentistry admission 2025 isopen. The college offers admission to a full-time BDS programme at the UG level and MDS programme at the PG level. Admission to this course is completely entrance-based. Candidates are admitted based on a valid score ofNEET.The application process atAmrita School of Dentistryis conducted in online mode. Read on for more details around Amrita School of Dentistry admissions in the article below.

Amrita School of Dentistryadmissionto all the courses is based on NEET score. Additionally, to be eligible for admission, candidates are required to meet minimum eligibility criteria to get shortlisted forAmrita School of Dentistry courses. Check below popular courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria related to Dentistry course admission 2025:
Amrita School of Dentistry course admissions 2025 for all courses are entirely entrance-based. Check below the complete Amrita School of Dentistry admission process:
Step 1: Application Process
For admission to any of the UG and PG courses at the college, the mode of application is online. Candidates are required to register online and then fill out the online application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
The college provides admission to all courses based on NEET UG and PG scores, followed by a counselling round.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Candidates are required to pay anAmrita School of Dentistry course feeto confirm their seat in the college.

admission_overview.college_name: GITAM University Vizag Course Admissions 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: GITAM admissionsare based on entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in JEE Main, CAT, XAT, etc. for admission. The institute conducts GAT or GITAM Admission Test for admission to various courses.GITAM Visakhapatnamoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. GITAM offers courses in streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Arts, etc. GITAM Visakhapatnam also offers distance education under the Centre for Distance Learning (CDL), approved by the Joint Committee of UGC-AICTE-DEC. Interested candidates can apply for the preferred course on the institute's website.
Check below popular GITAM Visakhapatnam courses along with respective eligibility and selection criteria:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with 60% aggregate
GAT/JEE Main+ Personal Interview
Bachelor’s degree with 50% aggregate
GAT/CAT/MAT/XAT/CMAT/NMAT/ATMA/GMAT+ Personal Interview
Class 12 with 50% aggregate
GAT + Personal Interview
Class 12 with 50% aggregate
GAT + Personal Interview
GITAM Visakhapatnam 2025 admissions are done by a mixture of entrance exam and merit basing on the course. The admission procedure 2025 at GITAM Visakhapatnam is offered in the following steps:

1: Application ProcessGITAM Visakhapatnam admission process starts with filling in an application. The application form is available on the official site of the university to prospective candidates. The application form has to be duly filled. It may be uploaded or sent to the department accordingly. On completion, the applicants will be expected to pay online application and entrance test fees. Two copies of online bank challan and the payment confirmation have to be attached to the application form.

2: Selection RoundsDifferent courses at GITAM Visakhapatnam are admitted based on a mix of university level entrance test, as well as national/ state level entrance test scores. In undergraduate courses, including BTech BSc and BBA. Applicants might be required to take GAT (GITAM Admission Test) which is administered by the university. In other cases, exam results such as JEE Main can be taken into account. Postgraduate programmes such as the MBA are selected by including the results of various tests such as GAT CAT, MAT XAT, CMAT NMAT, ATMA or GMAT.

3: Release and Counselling of merit lists.After all selection rounds are concluded, shortlisted candidates are expected to attend counselling process of specific courses that they plan to take. Then the GITAM Visakhapatnam will publish merit lists. The lists are used to denote selected candidates in different rounds. Students featured in merit list by name will have to ensure that they get admission. This is achieved by rendering payment prescribed fee within a time frame.

faqs.question: How does GITAM Visakhapatnam conduct MBA admissions?
faqs.answer: Admissions of the MBA program in GITAM Visakhapatnam are made on the basis of entrance examination scores, such as GAT and other Management entrance exams recognized at the university.The candidates should have a Bachelor of degree (at least 3 years of duration) or equivalent qualification in any field with at least 50 aggregates in a recognised university/college.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to the GITAM Visakhapatnam?
faqs.answer: No, for admission to GITAM Visakhapatnam the candidates have to clear GITAM Aptitude Test (GAT) and also fulfil the eligibility criteria, which are different for every programme offered by GITAM Visakhapatnam. GITAM Visakhapatnam also accepts the result of various entrance exams such as EAMCET, CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT, NMAT, GMAT, JEE, TS EAMCET or Andhra Pradesh etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to GITAM University?
faqs.answer: To get admission at GITAM Visakhapatnam, candidates should have completed their last qualification from a recognised institution with at least the aggregate set by the university as the minimum eligibility. However, admission to all the courses is entrance exam-based. Candidates need to appear for GITAM Admission Test (GAT) followed by a personal interview conducted by the university. Only if they clear GAT, they can get admission to the university. The candidates can also apply for admission in case they have a valid score in any other entrance exam accepted by the university.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BA at GITAM?
faqs.answer: GITAM School of Technology conducts its common GITAM Admission Test (GAT). Students seeking admission to BA courses at GITAM must appear for the aforementioned examination. After the result declaration of GAT, the admission committee of the institute prepares a rank list based on the GAT scores. Students are selected based on their respective rank and seat intake.

faqs.question: What are the placements for BSc food technology in Gitam University?
faqs.answer: The placement scenario in Gitam University for B.Sc. Food Technology is quite good, and the university has a dedicated placement cell that assists students in securing job opportunities in various reputed companies. The average package offered to B.Sc. Food Technology graduates in Gitam University is around 3-4 lakhs per annum. However, the placement package may vary depending on several factors such as the student's academic performance, skills, experience, and the industry's demand. In recent years, several reputed companies have visited Gitam University's campus for recruitment drives, including Nestle, Britannia, PepsiCo, Coca-Cola, ITC, etc. The University also provides various opportunities for internships, which help students gain practical experience and exposure to the industry. Overall, Gitam University offers good placement opportunities for B.Sc. Food Technology graduates.

Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #88 by the NIRF 2025 under the category University, #38 under Law, and #33 under Pharmacy. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the GITAM University Vizag rankings.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, GITAM University Vizag has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, GITAM University Vizag climbed 50 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, GITAM University Vizag climbed 13 ranks to #88 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, GITAM University Vizag's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, GITAM University Vizag's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: GITAM University Vizag Infrastructure: Hostels

hostel.description: Total 10 hostels are there in the university, 5 Boys hostels and 5 Girls hostels with all basic amenities like Uninterrupted power supply, Indoor games facilities, Availability of qualified doctors and resident warden, Round the clock security and WiFi.

library.description: Gandhi Institute of Technology and Management has a stock of more than 34 lakh books (including e-books), periodicals, national and international journals. reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by GITAM School of Technology, BengaluruReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Very dissatisfied because of placements and not worth the fee.
reviews.review_text: In my college, Wi-Fi facility is very bad; we are not getting proper data and signal. Washrooms are very small, poorly maintained, and unhygienic. There are very few bathrooms for a lot of people. Canteens are very expensive, and the food is also not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Business, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best experience I ever had.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are very good. The infrastructure, too, is very good. We have Wi-Fi facilities everywhere in the college, and every block has a library. Also, we have one library block to study. The hostel rooms are also very good, and the food in the mess is also nice. Medical facilities are provided whenever needed, and regular sports meets are conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has great infrastructure and an average faculty. Placements are improving.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. Good quality of facilities is provided, but it can be better in terms of food. The hostel food is not as good as it should be. It provides everything, but the taste of the food is not good. We can eat it. The college conducts sports events.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 11 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It offers a good environment and quality education. It is a bit expensive.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the classrooms are basic. Some of them have air-conditioners, and some of them just have normal fans. As it is a private university, we have to pay for the luxury, and the same happens in the hostel. However, everything is well-maintained and clean.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by GITAM School of Technology, BengaluruReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and hostel is comfortable.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi are available 24 hours with good bandwidth. Classrooms are AC with all required amenities. The classrooms are nice. Labs have what we need, and the library is good and best for the students with the best books. Hostel rooms are good with 24-hour Wi-Fi. The quality of food is better. Sports and games are nice. We can play anytime. Medical facilities are good, and they are available anytime.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Business, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 28 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college ever to experience.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are very good. The infrastructure is very good. We have Wi-Fi facilities everywhere in the college. Every block also has a library. We have one library block to study. The hostel rooms are also very good, and the food in mess is also nice. Medical facilities are provided whenever needed, and regular sports meets are conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by GITAM School of Law, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Well-maintained campus with quality teaching and average fees.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at GITAM University is very good for every department. On the campus, everywhere you go, they provide Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are also good for the students. All facilities on the campus are very good for the students, and there is a big library called KRC.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by GITAM School of Technology, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied with our college curriculum, infrastructure, hostel rooms, food, etc.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best hostel food, proper cleaning, and hygiene. It has top-class infrastructure and neat environment. Our college has its own hospital. About sports, every week we have a sports tournament which is conducted by our college. We have one of the best coaches.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GITAM School of Technology, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 13 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college atmosphere is very good. Good to learn and enjoy. I am very much satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very advanced L1 classrooms. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The Knowledge Resource Center library has a vast collection of books and knowledge. Hospitality is very good. Blankets are provided every day, food is very good in the hostel, and the canteen has reasonable prices and quality. There is a GIMS hospital easily accessible. There is an indoor and outdoor stadium and a high-class gym which is free for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GITAM School of Technology, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 13 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college atmosphere is very good. Good to learn and enjoy. I am very much satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24/7. The food is good. My department has good infrastructure with all the essential facilities required for academics. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with projectors. The campus has high-speed Wi-Fi. Though connectivity may fluctuate during speaking hours. Labs are well-maintained with updated systems and necessary software/equipment for practical sessions. The central library is a strong point, with a large collection of books, journals, e-resources, ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by GITAM School of Humanities and Social Science, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall best college for M.A. In Applied Psychology Course.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not compare to other colleges, and the hostel is not particularly comfortable. However, it is really pricey. The hotel's culinary selection outperforms those of several other on-campus hotels and cafes. The hospital is vast, and each hotel offers sports and recreational amenities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by GITAM School of Technology, BengaluruReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The better place for studies.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are excellent, and labs are very good. Free Wi-Fi is available here. The library is big, and a lot of books are available here. It is the best and peaceful place for reading, and the food is good. The hostel rooms are excellent, the medical facilities are excellent, and all are the best on the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Business, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college I have ever joined.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are very good. The infrastructure is very good. We have a Wi-Fi facility everywhere in the college. Every block has a library, and we have one library block to study. The hostel rooms are very good. The food in the mess is nice. Medical facilities are provided whenever needed. Regularly, sports meets are also conducted.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by GITAM School of Science, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 1 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best College for M.Sc. In the Food Science and Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: Our college has no hostels. In terms of amenities, it competes with other colleges in the city. Our college is equipped with a library, reading room, theatre, auditorium, computer lab, IT-enabled classroom, cafeteria, and gymnasium. Cleanliness is very important at our college. Bathrooms are clean, with water purifiers on each floor.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by GITAM School of Science, VisakhapatnamReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has very beautiful infrastructure, and the connectivity with people is very good.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are the best compared to other colleges. Food and medical facilities are very good. For sports and games, the college provides a balance of education and pursuing passions.

college_info.college_name: GITAM University Vizag Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Scholarships at GITAM (Deemed to be University) are offered on a first-come-first-serve basis. GITAM admissions via scholarships consider up to 20% of the sanctioned intake (except for Architecture & Physiotherapy, Engineering Core Branches, and Humanities branches), while for other programmes it is up to 50%. The institution has mainly five scholarship slabs, presented in the form of 100%, 75%, 50%, 25% and 15% tuition and fee waivers. However, there are scholarship schemes such as Employee Children Scholarships (60%, 40% and 20% waivers), Loyalty Scholarships (10% waiver) and Sports Scholarships, which offer rather an unconventional amount of fee waivers.
Major highlights related to GITAM University scholarships are as follows:

Statistics
Total disbursed amount
INR 3 crore per year

Renewable
Yes (every year)
Note: A personal interview round will be conducted for those who secure 100% and 75% scholarships.

Statistics
Tier A
Less than INR 12 LPA
Tier B
Less than INR 8 LPA

Note: Candidates admitted via merit scholarships will get an increment of 25% on their total tuition fee waiver if they apply for need-based scholarships (along with relevant documents) i.e. 75% tuition fee waivers will be upgraded to 100%. Also, need-based scholarship students will also be eligible for Loyalty Scholarships (provided that the fee waiver does not exceed 75%).

college_info.intro:
Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech and BSc students are placed in top companies such as SAP Labs, Amadeus Labs, Accenture, Persistent Systems, Amazon, Tata Consulting Engineers, Tech Mahindra, and others. Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT provides students with the opportunity to learn from experienced and skilled faculty members who specialise in the fields of Health Care and Hospital Industry, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, and others.
Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT BSc students can work as Information Security Managers, Ethical Hackers, Security Consultants, Cyber Security Analysts, and others. Overall, Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT is one of the top colleges offering professional education to students. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT offers PG and UG courses. These courses are provided across Food Technology, Electrical Engineering, Cyber Security, and others. At the UG level, the college offers four-year BTech, BSc, BBA, and BCA courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MCA and MTech courses to students. The college also provides two to three-year diploma courses to students. BTech is provided in 8 specialisations, namely Computer Science & Engineering, Information Technology, and others. BTech (Lateral) is also available in the college. faqs.answer: A:    Guru Nanak Institute of Technology (GNIT) accepts several entrance exams for admission to its B.Tech. programs. Here are the main ones:WBJEE (West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination): This is a state-level entrance exam for admission. JEE Main (Joint Entrance Examination Main): A national-level entrance exam conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA) for admission to various engineering colleges across India.CEE-AMPAI (Common Entrance Examination for Admission to Master of Pharmacy and Allied Courses in India): This exam is specifically for students seeking admission to engineering and pharmacy courses in West Bengal. For more accurate and latest information please visit the official website of Guru Nanak Institute of Technology or by contacting the admission office.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: With some ups and downs, you’ll experience a great college and campus life here.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who were placed last year was 25%. The highest package is 8 LPA, whereas the lowest package is about 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Amazon, Infosys, and Cognizant. This year, about 80% of our students got their internships. Top roles offered are software developer, web designer, UI/UX developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Here, you experience facilities like a gym, a good campus, sports, a library, free Wi-Fi, friendly teachers and students, and a ragging-free environment. It’s somewhere between good and excellent. But sometimes there are delays in starting some classes for the new semester.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has supportive faculty an updated curriculum, and decent hostel life.

review_content.Placements: Around 75-80 percent of students in my batch got placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA the lowest is 3 LPA and the average package is 5-6 LPA. Major recruiters included TCS Infosys Wipro Capgemini Accenture and some core companies for non-IT branches. Many students also received internships in reputed companies like Cognizant and startups. The common roles offered were software engineer analyst and developer. Overall placements are good especially for CSE/IT.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has wellequipped classrooms with smart boards highspeed WiFi and a central library with sufficient books and e-resources. Labs are modern and maintained properly. Hostel facilities are decent with spacious rooms 24/7 water and electricity and reasonable cleanliness. The mess food is average but hygienic and the canteen provides better alternatives. Sports grounds and indoor games facilities are also available. Medical facilities on campus are reliable.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Institute of Technology - GNIT Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, balanced curriculum, and a vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: On average, from my department, above 75 percent of students get placement. In the previous year, the highest package was 20 LPA. So many companies visit our campus, like Cognizant, Capgemini, Juspay, Accenture, Wipro, etc. In the case of internships, about 60 percent of students get an internship opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: Our college boasts a modern B.Tech infrastructure with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and an innovative learning environment. The hostel provides a homely stay with clean rooms, Wi-Fi, and nutritious food. They create a perfect blend of comfort, growth, and lifelong memories.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members and campus.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and average is 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and Deloitte. 70-75 percent of students got internships at Infosys, Cognizant, and Capgemini. Top roles are software engineer, analyst, and developer.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-maintained computer labs, electronics labs, and a library for the entire department. Hostel facilities are good with clean rooms, nutritious food, medical aid, and space for sports and games, ensuring a balanced campus life.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, balanced curriculum, and a vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our college boasts a modern B.Tech infrastructure with well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, and an innovative learning environment. The hostel provides a homely stay with clean rooms, Wi-Fi, and nutritious food. They create a perfect blend of comfort, growth, and lifelong memories.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and campus.
reviews.review_text: Our department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-maintained computer labs, electronics labs, and a library for the entire department. Hostel facilities are good with clean rooms, nutritious food, medical aid, and space for sports and games, ensuring a balanced campus life.

reviews.review_heading: With some ups and downs, you’ll experience a great college and campus life here.
reviews.review_text: Here, you experience facilities like a gym, a good campus, sports, a library, free Wi-Fi, friendly teachers and students, and a ragging-free environment. It’s somewhere between good and excellent. But sometimes there are delays in starting some classes for the new semester.

reviews.review_heading: The college has supportive faculty an updated curriculum, and decent hostel life.
reviews.review_text: The campus has wellequipped classrooms with smart boards highspeed WiFi and a central library with sufficient books and e-resources. Labs are modern and maintained properly. Hostel facilities are decent with spacious rooms 24/7 water and electricity and reasonable cleanliness. The mess food is average but hygienic and the canteen provides better alternatives. Sports grounds and indoor games facilities are also available. Medical facilities on campus are reliable.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, and decent facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus has well-equipped classrooms with smart boards, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a central library with sufficient books and e-resources. Labs are modern and maintained properly. Hostel facilities are decent with spacious rooms, 24/7 water and electricity, and reasonable cleanliness. The mess food is average but hygienic, and the canteen provides better alternatives. Sports grounds and indoor games facilities are also available. Medical facilities on campus are reliable.

reviews.review_heading: Growing institute with balanced academics and activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for ECE is quite good. The classrooms are spacious with projectors, a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and well-equipped labs for electronics, communication, and basic programming. The library has a good collection of technical books and journals. The hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, 24/7 water, and average but manageable mess food. The canteen food is better than the mess, and medical facilities are available on campus for emergencies. Sports facilities for cricket, footba...

reviews.review_heading: College has excellent infrastructure and strong industry connections for bright future for students.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped labs with modern machinery. There is a central library with a vast collection of books and research papers. Every year, the university organizes a big sports tournament (JIS Spirit). There are separate grounds for every game, and also a common room for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: The atmosphere of my college is good.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs have ACs in them, and Wi-Fi is available. Library is full of books, and college infrastructure is pretty well. Classrooms have a student capacity of 60. I don't stay in a hostel, but from the reviews I heard that the hostel's rooms are not very good. The food provided there is not of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Guru Nanak Institute of Technology is a good private engineering college.
reviews.review_text: I do not stay in the hostel. I travel daily from my home. But my friends tell me that everything is fine and good. The water and electricity facilities are good and nice. The quality of food is given to the students thrice a day at a particular time.

reviews.review_heading: I think this is a good college for serious studying students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all the time in college. Labs are very neat and clean. CSE labs have AC room. Library is so good. It has good environment for studying. The faculty is also good. I am not a hostel student but I hear that the hostel is comfortable for students, and also the food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with supportive faculty, placement, good infrastructure, and enjoyable college life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is quite good with proper facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms with projectors, well-maintained labs, and a library that has a wide range of books. Hostel facilities are also decent with clean rooms, proper water supply, and good security arrangements. Mess food is average but hygienic. Canteen provides a wide variety of foods for students. Medical facilities are available on campus for emergencies. Sports ground is well-maintained for outdoor games, along with indoor ...

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good in our college. All kinds of facilities are available, like ground, gym, and air-conditioned labs (for CSE only). I cannot exactly tell about the hostel quality as I do not live there. The college also organises various events of sports, hackathons, quizzes, etc.

reviews.review_heading: GNIT is the best private B.Tech college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on every floor of the college. The lab sessions are very attractive, and the classrooms are neat and clean. The quality of the food in the canteen is good, and the prices are also cheap. There is a huge ground to play cricket, basketball, and volleyball, and there is also a common room with indoor games like carrom, chess, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and teaching quality with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of GNIT Sodepur is commendable. The classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and equipped with smart boards. Wi-Fi is available across the campus and in the hostel. Labs are well-maintained with updated systems and equipment relevant to the curriculum. The library is stocked with reference books and journals, and has a digital section.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers good infrastructure, smart classrooms, and well-equipped labs.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a good library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities and Wi-Fi. Mess food is hygienic but average in taste. Medical and sports facilities are available on campus. There is also a playground.

college_info.intro:
Centurion University Vizag comprises 6 schools of study through which it offers UG and PG courses across various streams such as Management, Engineering, Paramedical, Pharmacy, Agriculture, and others. MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Centurion University of Technology and Management offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Computer Science & Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Electronics & Communication Engineering.
The MBA programme offered by Centurion University Tekkali is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Finance, Marketing, Digital Marketing, and others. Below mentioned are Centurion University Vizag's popular programmes:

IndusInd Bank, Flipkart, Infosys, Acadecraft, Shriram Finance Ltd,
faqs.question: Can HCL and HP be considered as some of the top recruiters of Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradesh?

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot get into Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradesh with 70 percent in class 12th. The selection is based on the CUEE (Centurion University Entrance Exam) or Joint Entrance Examination Main scores. For Bachelor of Technology programs, the eligibility criteria typically require a minimum of 50 percent in 10+2 with specific subject combinations, and a valid score in Centurion University Entrance Exam or JEE Main.
faqs.question: Can I get into Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradesh with 70% in class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    At the undergraduate level, the Centurion University of Technology and Management offers four-year BTech courses in several specialisations. The eligibility criteria of the BTech at Centurion University Vishakhapatnam is passed Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate and the accepted entrance exams are Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, JEE Main, CUEE, and others. The fees for BTech ranges from INR 4 Lacs to INR 45.98 lakh. Hence, candidates can apply on the official website of the university and follow the application process for admission to various courses.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech at Centurion University?

faqs.answer: A:    Hello Nishar Ahmed, Centurion University of Technology and Management has the standard eligibility criterias for its various courses. For example, for graduation courses, eligibility is 12th pass, for post graduation courses it's graduation in that particular discipline, for some certificate courses, it's 10th and for some it's 12th. Minimum marks are required only for admission to engineering courses which is at 50% for general category students and less for reserved category of students. However I would like to put in a word of caution. With implementation of National Education Policy on the anvil, this will change drastically. In this all admissions will be after 12th. First year of graduation will yield "certificate", two years of studies will earn "diploma" and three years study will get graduation degree to the students. Keep reading newspapers for any announcements.Best wishes to you.

reviews_list.review_title: Great campus and facilities, but placements need improvement.

review_content.Placements: Our batch has courses like B.Tech and ECE. Placement percentage is around 89%. The highest package is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Deloitte. Around 70% of students secured internships at companies like TCS, Wipro, and Accenture. Roles offered are software engineer, data analyst, cloud engineer, and cybersecurity analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available across the campus with good speed. Our college has spacious classrooms with a projector and smart board. We have well-equipped labs with high-performance computers and necessary software. There is a vast library with a great collection of books, research papers, and digital resources. There are dedicated research and innovation centers for hand-on projects.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is totally good and helpful.

review_content.Placements: In our college, maximum everyone got placed but with low CTC. The highest package in our branch is 7 LPA, but it is sales or marketing sides. Recruiting companies are Infosys, Cognizant, and many more. Recently we also attended correct companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is fine, but we have to walk a greater distance to take the afternoon lunch or dinner. We face a lot of issues with this. It is highly restricted. The quality of the hostel is good. The Wi-Fi facility in labs and classrooms is good.

The university is accredited with A Grade by NAAC, Ministry of HRD. The university is also approved by the AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education).

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Centurion University Vishakhapatnam is a good university. Centurion University Vishakhapatnam offers placement assistance to students. overview_faqs.question: Has Centurion University collaborated with any college or university?

overview_faqs.question: Is Centurion University approved by UGC?

content.Placements: I belong to the Centurion University Andhra Pradesh B.Tech in computer science and engineering batch of 2026. Our course focused on core areas such as programming, data structures, algorithms, database system, machine learning, and software engineering which provided a strong foundation for both industry and higher education opportunities. In our batch, approximately 30% of students are successfully placed through campus placements. The highest package offered is 18 LPA by a top multinational product-based company, while the lowest package is 3.5 LPA typically from service-based firms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is coping with the latest technology.

content.Placements: 90% of students get placed in our college. The highest package is 30 LPA and the average package is 2 LPA. Cognizant and Efftronics are two top companies that visit the college for placements. 50% of students from my batch got internships in their respective fields. Automation specialist role is offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is still being constructed but it is good for now. Labs are good but with limited materials and access. Facilities like Wi-Fi, library, gym, etc., are available. Hostel rooms and food are suitable for a South Indian. Sports are also conducted timely.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great campus and facilities, but placements need improvement.

content.Placements: Our batch has courses like B.Tech and ECE. Placement percentage is around 89%. The highest package is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Deloitte. Around 70% of students secured internships at companies like TCS, Wipro, and Accenture. Roles offered are software engineer, data analyst, cloud engineer, and cybersecurity analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available across the campus with good speed. Our college has spacious classrooms with a projector and smart board. We have well-equipped labs with high-performance computers and necessary software. There is a vast library with a great collection of books, research papers, and digital resources. There are dedicated research and innovation centers for hand-on projects.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is totally good and helpful.

content.Placements: In our college, maximum everyone got placed but with low CTC. The highest package in our branch is 7 LPA, but it is sales or marketing sides. Recruiting companies are Infosys, Cognizant, and many more. Recently we also attended correct companies.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is fine, but we have to walk a greater distance to take the afternoon lunch or dinner. We face a lot of issues with this. It is highly restricted. The quality of the hostel is good. The Wi-Fi facility in labs and classrooms is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Radiology and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My second home - Never felt alone.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed. The highest package offered was 8 LPA. The average package was around 3 LPA. I got a placement offer from Apollo Hospital in Radiology field. A student had to pass all the exams to avail any placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was top-notch. There were many facilities to support the students in day to day life of college. College was equipped with Wi-Fi to give easy access to the studies. Every classroom was equipped with LED screens. The mess canteen food was a thing that needs improvement, there was lack of diversity in the menu of food.

admission_process.title: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradesh Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradeshoffers entrance-based admissions. The admission process includes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list or counselling and other steps. Check below the Centurion University admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

The CUTM AP application process is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates, willing to apply online need to visit the CUEE tab available on the CUTM official website and apply for the entrance exam.
Step 2: Selection Rounds & Merit List

Admission to all courses is based on CUEE score. For BTech, the university also accepts JEE Main scores for admission. JEE Main rank up to 3 lakh and CUEE rank up to 50,000 is required for CUTM BTech admission. The university releases a merit list announcing the names of the shortlisted candidates.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted candidates need to pay the admission confirmation fee to secure their admission and visit the college campus for the document verification process.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech at Centurion University?
faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, the Centurion University of Technology and Management offers four-year BTech courses in several specialisations. The eligibility criteria of the BTech at Centurion University Vishakhapatnam is passed Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate and the accepted entrance exams are Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, JEE Main, CUEE, and others. The fees for BTech ranges from INR 4 Lacs to INR 45.98 lakh. Hence, candidates can apply on the official website of the university and follow the application process for admission to various courses.

faqs.question: How shall candidates pay certain amount of fee to secure their seat at Centurion University of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: The successful/ qualified applicants will be contacted or he/she may take provisional admission by depositing the minimum fee through Cash/DD at Centurion University of Technology and Management Campus or by paying online to university specified account.

faqs.question: Can students get selected at Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradesh with JEE Mains range of 60-70 percentile?
faqs.answer: Centurion University of Technology and Management (CUTM) usually favors higher JEE Mains percentiles in their selection process.A candidate requires 250 marks in JEE main to obtain 90 percentile. A percentile between 90 to 95 or holding ranks between 14,000 and 45,000 can be considered good for getting admission to top colleges.For B.Tech admission,CUTM considers CUEE merit and PI or JEE cut-off.CUTM also requires a minimum of 60% aggregate marks in Class XII with Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and English as subjects.However, at Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradesh, generally CUEE and AP EAMCET ranking are considered. The last round ranking for AP EAMCET is 6169 in the year 2022.

faqs.question: How many students can do B Sc. at Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.answer: The Centurion University of Technology and Management in Andhra Pradesh has a batch of 21 students for its B.Sc. program. The university has around 10,000 students.To be eligible for a B.Sc. programme at Centurion University, you need to have:10+2 (Physics, Chemistry, Maths/ Biology) with 45%10+2 (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) with 60% from Odisha Board/CBSE/ICSE/Other board10+2 (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) with 80% for Andhra Pradesh Board

paragraphs: As per the placement statistics 2023, the overall highest package offered during placements 2023 was INR 13.8 LPA . More than 2,300 offers were made and above 200 recruiters were visited during Centurion University Vizianagaram placements 2023. Further, 100% placement rate was recorded during placements 2023. The top recruiters of Centurion University Vizianagaram in placements 2023 were Hexaware Technologies, Adani Group, Wipro, Reliance Jio, Sutherland Global , etc.

faqs.question: Is Centurion University good in terms of placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, Centurion University Vishakhapatnam offers placement assistance to students. Centurion University Vishakhapatnam offers placement assistance to students. The top companies taking part in the placement drive are HCL, Cognizant, Accenture, and others. No.of offers made were over 1,000, no.of companies visited was over 350, no.of students placed was over 1,400, and the other top recruiters are JK Papers Ltd, Piramal, Syngenta, Amazon, Mindtree, SanDisk, Axis Bank, HSBC, Gateway Technolabs, Dorma, and others.

faqs.question: Can HCL and HP be considered as some of the top recruiters of Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.answer: In 2023, the highest salary package offered was INR 12 LPA, the average was INR 6 LPA, and the lowest was INR 5 LPA. HCL and Wipro are top recruiters for Centurion University of Technology and Management. Placements were good this year (2023), 100% of the students were placed during the placements. 200+ companies visited the campus for recruitment. 2300+ offers were made, and 47 were provided with an offer above INR 9 LPA. IndusInd Bank, Flipkart, Infosys, Acadecraft, Shriram Finance Ltd, Hexaware Technologies, Adani Group, Reliance Jio, and Sutherland Global were also some of the other main recruiters hiring from the campus of Centurion University of Technology and Management.

faqs.question: Are pursuing UG courses at Centurion University of Technology and Management, Andhra Pradesh expensive?
faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, Centurion University of Technology located in Vizianagaram in Andhra Pradesh is spread on an area of almost hundred acres. This place has quite a lot of students centric facilities like library Wi-Fi modem classrooms sports arenas etc. being a private University it has to spend money only from the fees collected from the students. In spite of this which this university charges is not exorbitant but is quite commensurate with the facilities provided to the students. It charges just about rupees 1.25 Lacs per year fees for engineering courses. While the same is just about rupees 50000 for BBA and about rupees 100000 for BSc. For the students of Diploma it charges just about rupees 50000 per year. Those we can see that the fees are very reasonable for a private University giving quality education and also providing lots of facilities for the students communities. Best wishes to you.

hostel_campus.college_name: Centurion University of Technology and Management

reviews.review_heading: I will suggest others to join my college.
reviews.review_text: I am currently a 4th-year B.Tech student in computer science and engineering (artificial intelligence and machine learning) at Centurion University, Andhra Pradesh. The infrastructure provided for our course is modern and well-equipped to support both academic and practical learning. Our department has Wi-Fi-enabled smart classrooms, well-maintained computer labs with high-speed internet, and access to industry-standard tools and software used in AI and machine learning.

reviews.review_heading: It is coping with the latest technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is still being constructed but it is good for now. Labs are good but with limited materials and access. Facilities like Wi-Fi, library, gym, etc., are available. Hostel rooms and food are suitable for a South Indian. Sports are also conducted timely.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and facilities, but placements need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available across the campus with good speed. Our college has spacious classrooms with a projector and smart board. We have well-equipped labs with high-performance computers and necessary software. There is a vast library with a great collection of books, research papers, and digital resources. There are dedicated research and innovation centers for hand-on projects.

reviews.review_heading: It is totally good and helpful.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is fine, but we have to walk a greater distance to take the afternoon lunch or dinner. We face a lot of issues with this. It is highly restricted. The quality of the hostel is good. The Wi-Fi facility in labs and classrooms is good.

reviews.review_heading: My second home - Never felt alone.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was top-notch. There were many facilities to support the students in day to day life of college. College was equipped with Wi-Fi to give easy access to the studies. Every classroom was equipped with LED screens. The mess canteen food was a thing that needs improvement, there was lack of diversity in the menu of food.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college. It provides some placements.
reviews.review_text: A Wi-Fi facility is available in labs, and classrooms are fine. The quality of the hostel and the quality of food available in the mess is good. The distance between the mess and the college is more. The canteen facilities are fine. Games and playground facilities are helpful.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. There are some placement difficulties for each student.
reviews.review_text: Availability of hostel is good but students face some issues due to the amount of the fee. The mess food is quite difficult to eat. Everything is fine but the distance is a lot for taking food from college to the mess. Wi-Fi in labs and classrooms is fine. The library infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are quite good and helpful for the students. The Wi-Fi and library facilities are good. The quality of teaching is decent, and the college provides the necessary resources to learn. The quality of the hostel is quite bad. You need to walk for a while to get food.

reviews.review_heading: My college life, how I managed, and what I understood.
reviews.review_text:
College infrastructure is good, but hostel water gives skin allergies, and rooms are not clean. Sweepers will not regularly come to clean the rooms. 
But coming to food, it's far better when compared to remaining colleges; the warden is not so good, and AC rooms aren't available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there was a separate library that was provided with a full of informative books. They provide the WiFi for the internet access. They provide the A-class facilities, and the food was nice—daily one special. And they conduct the sports programs, in that they will make to keep a tournament between us and another college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent and good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are decent, offering clean rooms and basic amenities, though space can be a bit cramped. Wi-Fi and laundry services are available, and the food is average. For those in rented accommodation, options vary but often provide more space and privacy, with the added benefit of choosing a location closer to campus or city amenities. Overall, it's comfortable, but with room for improvement.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college for Mechanical Engineering, as it is highly in demand.
reviews.review_text: The hostel faculty are friendly to everyone, and the college maintains a ragging-free environment. However, the quality of the the food is somewhat disappointing. The hostel fees are reasonable, although the AC rooms are slightly more expensive. Additionally, there are gym facilities available, both indoors and outdoors.

reviews.review_heading: The college and its beauty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is good. Wi-Fi is available 24/7. Labs are quite clean and useful. Classrooms are digital, and the library is very useful and good. Food available in the mess and canteen is very tasty and even healthy. They also provide medical facilities such as a medical kit and emergency vehicle. We have good sports facilities and a big playground for different sports, and sports meets are conducted. We can play any games in our playground.

reviews.review_heading: Fabulous college placement was good last year (2022).
reviews.review_text: Facilities in this college are really good: infrastructure is up to par, Wi-Fi is good everywhere, labs are okay, classrooms are nice, and the library is beautiful, big, and very peaceful. Facilities in the hostel are okay, mess food is acceptable, and medical facilities are available here, like an ambulance, 24/7. Varieties of sports and games are present with coaches.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college for this course in Odisha. Beautiful place and nice placement this year.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course or department are very good. Wi-Fi is good everywhere here, labs are okay in my department, and classrooms are nice and big. The library is very beautiful and a center of attraction here. Hostel facilities are good, the mess is okay, and sports and games are available here.

college_info.intro:
Mohan Babu University provides MBA, MTech, and BTech as popular programmes at the UG and PG levels. The specialisations include Certified Investment Banking Operations Professional, Business Analytics, Computer Science and Engineering, CSE (AI & ML), Data Science, Cyber Security, Electronics and Communication Engineering, etc.
In addition to that, courses in commerce, computer applications, and pharmacy are also available at Mohan Babu University Andhra Pradesh. The eligibility criteria for MTech involve a 50% marks in Graduation, similarly, a course such as MBA is offered for 2 years with eligibility criteria of 50% marks in Graduation. admission_overview.college_name: Mohan Babu University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Admission Process

paragraphs: MBU admissions 2025for all courses are now open. The University accepts applications online through its official website MBU. The eligibility criteria for admission to the University are based on merit and entrance-based criteria. The University administers its entrance examination namelyMBUCET. In addition to the MBU common entrance examination, the University also administers various national-level entrance exams like JEE Main and JEE Advanced for admission to BTech, offered by theMBU School of Engineering and Computing.
Mohan Babu University offers over 50+ courses at the undergraduate level and postgraduate level through six schools and the names of the schools are listed below:

To secure admission to Mohan Babu University courses, the candidates should meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and apply to that course through the official website. The table below mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for Mohan Babu University Courses:

MBU admission processbegins with applying to the course via the MBU official website followed by appearing for the selection process and then receiving the final admission offer. The stepwise detailed MBU admission process is given below:
Step 1: MBU Application Process

Candidates seeking admission at Mohan Babu University need to apply for their desired course through the MBU official website before the application deadline. The candidates need to pay the MBU application fee amounting to INR 500, which is non-refundable.
Step 2: MBU Selection Rounds

Aspirants need to appear for the entrance exam MBU accepts for admission to a particular course. Mohan Babu University conductsMBUCETfor admission to BTech courses.Candidates appearing in the exam must note that MBUCET syllabus is based on Class 11 and Class 12 topics.
Step 3: MBA Final Admission
Selected candidates need to pay the admission confirmation fee to secure their seats

placement_data.title: Mohan Babu University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Career Development Centre (CDC) of Mohan Babu University is primarily focused on assisting students in developing their ability to assess opportunities and understand the actions, decisions, and information necessary to transform a job opportunity into a significant career milestone. MBU has offered over 6,000 placements in over 250 MNCs over the last three years.

Recently, Mohan Babu University has concluded the placements for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, 112 recruiters participated in the placement process and offered 2084 job offers to the batch 2024. The highest package offered during Mohan Babu University placements in 2024 stood at INR 60 LPA . This package was offered by Google. Further, Amazon offered the second highest package of INR 45 LPA. Additionally, 45% of students were placed in MNCs with packages exceeding INR 6 LPA. The top recruiters of Mohan Babu University in 2024 included Google , Infosys, Accenture, Amazon, HCL, TCS , Deloitte , etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mohan Babu University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
24/7 supply of water and electricity., CCTV monitoring and security guards. 
Wi-Fi and internet facilities inside the campus.
1000 Rooms are available

library.description:
The Central library of MBU is the one of the biggest treasures and a remarkable place for the reader's community. It serves the prime objective of supporting the academics and research programs of the institute by offering various physical and online resources. 

Spread across three centrally air-conditioned floors, the library has Wi-Fi and caters to the reading capacity of six hundred readers. It is home to a massive collection of 1,42,422 volumes and approx. 22,000 titles. The library has a fully automated Integrated Library Management System (ILMS) through KOHA software for all the library-related services and an RFID based circulation system. 

The Central Library proudly possesses a magnanimous collection of various textbooks, E-books, E-journals from paramount publications across many genres and subjects, along with video lectures. It has everything you need to quench your thirst for knowledge. The library also has high-quality reprographics and print facilities. The Digital Library is equipped with sixty high configuration computers.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Volleyball Court

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, strict rules. More feels worst food, no enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Forest food, good rooms, good infrastructure and the facilities are available in the subject Analog Electronics in the place of IPS. We are in a meeting with the team and we will be upgraded to Platinum Debit Cars and this is the first option for you.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructures is very good.
reviews.review_text: Libraries are pretty good in our university. The hostel facilities are average and comfortable for students. The food in the mess and canteen is good, though sometimes it could be better. Medical facilities are available in campus if a student falls sick. The sports and game facilities are nice, and students can play different games to stay healthy and enjoy their free time. They also take us to tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Dream, believe, and achieve.
reviews.review_text: We have very good infrastructure in our college. Library is the best part of our college. They provide Wi-Fi too. Faculty in Mohan Babu University are above average. They have good content and more information about subjects. Hostels are not that good but we can stay. The food they provide is average. In Mohan Babu University, they conduct many games and also take us to other tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Offers good infrastructure, average faculty, and improving placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are pretty impressive and good. We have been provided with a very vast and extraordinary library. The college also has a very big playground. They conduct sports days and encourage sports by congratulating students with trophies, and also provide free education for state-level and national-level players.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best option to take admission in our college. Infrastructure and hostel facilities are nice
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in the hostel and college. They provide all the needed infrastructure to the students, and all are very clean and neat. Food is also not bad, and it is average in my opinion, and the college looking wise is very nice, and no other issues regarding facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The year with a lot of future goals and memories upcoming.
reviews.review_text: My hostel is 4-room sharing. It is good, ventilated, and comfortable. We have emergency services along with it. Sometimes we have fun activities, and we have a good food menu and 24/7 Wi-Fi. We also have CCTV cameras and washing machines to wash clothes, and we also have many permissions.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is good, I would rate it 5 star.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. It feels very aesthetic. You can enjoy your college life. When it comes to college, it is very pleasant. College hostels are very good and spacious, and the fee is high. But the infrastructure for both college and hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: I like my college and I do not regret joining.
reviews.review_text: In my hostel fee structure is good. Food is not good and many students are suffering from health issues due to the inequality in maintaining food quality. Most people are facing this situation in every hostel not adjusting. Rooms are sufficient, but not properly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: It's a waste of college and a waste of money to invest, so I don't suggest this college.
reviews.review_text: I didn't like anything in my college library, which is just awesome, but the faculty and the rest are the worst. I don't suggest that anyone join this college for any of them. Faculty doesn't know anything. Only some of the faculty are knowledgeable persons.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: The libraries in our university are good. Hostel facilities are comfortable for students. The food in the mess and canteen is mostly good, though sometimes it could be better. Medical facilities are available on campus for students who fall sick. Sports and game facilities are nice, allowing students to stay healthy and enjoy their free time.

reviews.review_heading: Dream. Believe. Achieve. Good infrastructure, a central library, Security, and highly equipped labs.
reviews.review_text: Mohan Babu University is in the 150-200 band for its facilities and infrastructure. It is about 100 acres of land, a vast area. When it comes to labs, they are highly equipped with the latest and updated versions of equipment. The central library contains all domains of books, discussion halls, etc. The mess canteen and medical facilities are rated 4 out of 5. Regarding sports and games, there is a huge ground where students play all kinds of sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are pretty impressive and good. They provide labs and all necessary instruments to the students. The library in our college is the most attractive thing in our college. We have many hostels in and out of the campus, and they provide us with good food. We also have a canteen. The ambiance and the food in the canteen are too good. We also have sports. They even conduct sports days, and they take the students who are interested in games to tournaments held in other sta...

reviews.review_heading: My university is good for improving our knowledge. It is a good environment to learn things.
reviews.review_text: We have free Wi-Fi, attached washrooms, and daily cleaning in the rooms and washrooms, and hygienic food. We have a library which is the centre of attraction in the whole campus, which is full AC on three floors, and we have a canteen which is named the Pops Canteen, and the college is full of free Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: There are good facilities and good infrastructure. The placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department, like Wi-Fi and labs, are good. Mainly, the library is very good. The mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are good. The hostels in Mohan Babu University were so good. Mainly, the washroom is cleaned daily.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not completely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are not bad, but they have not reached our expectations. Wi-Fi trouble us sometimes. The best thing we have and we can use is the library, which contains more facilities. Spending more time there is great. The food tastes good sometimes, and worse sometimes, it depends. Coming to hostels, it's not as much as we expected.

This exchange provides a culture of ongoing learning and collaboration among students and faculty.

paragraphs: Yes, Mohan Babu University offers scholarships to students based on their performance in MBU CET. Students who qualify in MBUCET-2024 Phase-1 and take admission within 45 days of results declaration, will get a scholarship of INR 50,000 which will be adjusted against first year fees.Students who qualify in MBUCET-2024 Phase-2 and take admission within 45 days of results declaration, will get a scholarship of INR 25,000 which will be adjusted against first year fees.

college_info.college_name: Buddha Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Buddha Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best dental college in Bihar.

review_content.Placements: Our batch consists of 100 students that get allotted to the college according to the marks secured in the NEET exam. Almost every student passing out of the college gets either a government or private job in any dental college in the country. Every student completes their internship from the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every classroom in our college is fully air-conditioned, and there are also smart classrooms with LCD screens and projectors. Our college has a large library with books related to the curriculum, and it also has books on NEET PG preparation. Hostel rooms of the college are double bedded and non-air-conditioned rooms with reading tables and chairs. The room does not have an attached bathroom. The mess food quality is good, and it frequently changes with time. It serves both north Indian and south Indian foods. The college conducts several sports and games on the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I must recommend BDS aspirants to join this college.

review_content.Placements: The placements in our college are awesome. Almost every student who graduated from our college got placed in either government or private hospitals. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 75,000 per month, depending on the state and hospital you join. You can also do practice on your own by opening a dental clinic of your own. Every student of our college gets their internship through the college only.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but it is not at par with the infrastructure of Southern Indian dental colleges. Overall, the services and facilities at our college are good. The college has a huge library, where you can read books and also borrow them. The college has huge lecture rooms and a decent hostel also, but the hostel rooms are non-air-conditioned. It is a drawback.

overview_faqs.answer: Buddha Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital is a distinguished institution offering MDS, BDS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Buddha Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Buddha Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital has received an impressive review rating of 4.33 based on student feedback at Shiksha. review_summary.college_name: Buddha Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: New opportunities for dental students.

content.Placements: Since being a final-year student at my college, I hope that I would be the suited for this task. During my batch, there are 92 students, and as interns and learning students, we get a lot of exposure to patients and deal with numerous of patients, which is indeed good for independent clinic set-up pre-training. Many pass-out students and seniors are doing bright in their careers.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is well-maintained with proper food supply and maintenance that you can aspect. Although the college lacks in infrastructure and other projects and activities, as they are still working on it and progressing years.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best dental college in Bihar.

content.Placements: Our batch consists of 100 students that get allotted to the college according to the marks secured in the NEET exam. Almost every student passing out of the college gets either a government or private job in any dental college in the country. Every student completes their internship from the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: Every classroom in our college is fully air-conditioned, and there are also smart classrooms with LCD screens and projectors. Our college has a large library with books related to the curriculum, and it also has books on NEET PG preparation. Hostel rooms of the college are double bedded and non-air-conditioned rooms with reading tables and chairs. The room does not have an attached bathroom. The mess food quality is good, and it frequently changes with time. It serves both north Indian and south Indian foods. The college conducts several sports and games on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I must recommend BDS aspirants to join this college.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are awesome. Almost every student who graduated from our college got placed in either government or private hospitals. The salary offered ranges from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 75,000 per month, depending on the state and hospital you join. You can also do practice on your own by opening a dental clinic of your own. Every student of our college gets their internship through the college only.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but it is not at par with the infrastructure of Southern Indian dental colleges. Overall, the services and facilities at our college are good. The college has a huge library, where you can read books and also borrow them. The college has huge lecture rooms and a decent hostel also, but the hostel rooms are non-air-conditioned. It is a drawback.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the facilities provided in this college.

content.Placements: 90% of students are placed in course. The highest package is 80%. The lowest is 60% and average is 70%. There are best dental colleges in India. 100% of students got internship from this course. Some students opt for practice in private clinics and some prepare for MS course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good but infrastructure is not well maintained. Labs, classrooms and library are fully air conditioned. They are always cleaned. Wi-Fi is also available for PG students only. Quality of facilities and food available in mess in hostel is good.

faqs.answer: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.
faqs.question: Q: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.
faqs.question: Q: Why do nurses fail Nursing classes?
