description: What's new at Dr. Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Rajasthan Ayurved University, Jodhpur cut off 2022? AIAPGET Stray Vacancy Round Seat Allotment results have been released on Mar 17. The reporting for the same is to be held between Mar 17 and Mar 23. Dr. Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Rajasthan Ayurved University Jodhpur admission 2023 to MS, MD and PG Diploma courses in Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha, and Homeopathy are based on AIAPGET PG scores followed by AIAPGET PG Counselling 2022. Conducted in four rounds, AIAPGET PG Stray Vacancy Round is the last round of counselling. For more details regarding the Dr. Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Rajasthan Ayurved University Jodhpur cut off 2022, stay tuned to this page.

Dr. Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Rajasthan Ayurved University cutoff 2024 has been released, for it's third round for the candidates seeking admission to the NEET UG course. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 3 Seat Allotment Result, the most competitive course was BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery with a cutoff rank of 127867 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dr. Sarvepalli Radhakrishnan Rajasthan Ayurved University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Shekhawati Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 27 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good institute of the city.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities on the campus. And all the services provided by the college are the best. The college department is very gentle. There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, Science lab, computer lab, playground, NCC, classroom, off-course, and a big library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Rajasthan Unani Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A good college, but if there is a hostel, this is the best one.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not too much, but average. We have a physiology lab and anatomy lab, a decent classroom, and a good library. There is a negative point, our college doesn't have a hostel, but we think there must be a good hostel in the future. Overall, there are decent types of facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Shekhawati Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Colleges are very good for students. That's why students get a good education from college.
reviews.review_text: In my course, many facilities are available, like digital learning and digital libraries, and are covered with high-quality Wi-Fi. Classrooms are also very good. In the hostel, anytime support for wardan and hospital emergency, and the college is also a family. Mess is very clear and good hostels have facilities to play games and many more.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Madan Mohan Malviya Government Ayurveda CollegeReviewed on 29 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the course that I am pursuing in my college.
reviews.review_text: My college was established in 1946, so as expected, it has that old building. However, classrooms are neat and clean. Wi-Fi is available, and for special video lectures, we have a projector installed in every classroom. The college also has library facilities where students can take their important books for better studies. The hostel is the same as the college building, like an old type. Food is provided by the hostel mess at very affordable rates. It serves good quality food. It is a medical c...

reviews.review_heading: My college has good faculty, placement, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average, not so good and not so bad, and in my opinion, both will improve in the future. The hostel is not present at present but may be budgeted for in some months. A canteen facility is present. Sports and games are present, both average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Shekhawati Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 30 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college campus, infrastructure, and teachers.
reviews.review_text: The conditions of classrooms are really good. The hostel is located within the campus area. It has a managed timetable for all activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Swasthya Kalyan Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 27 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All were good and gave support.
reviews.review_text: The library and every classroom are big, and some rooms have projectors. Labs are available for blood testing and naturopathic treatments. Overall, the college campus is good. There are good and very nice facilities are available outside the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Swasthya Kalyan Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 24 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Swasthya Kalyan - A review report.
reviews.review_text: There are projectors in every classroom along with mics and speakers for teachers. It has exhaust fans in classrooms and Wi-Fi facility. Hostel is also 1 KM away from college. We have mess and canteen. Vegetarian and Indian food is prepared there for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shekhawati Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 12 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is good for enjoying purposes. You can join this college at your own risk.
reviews.review_text: The campus has some facilities like airy classrooms, labs, a library, a canteen which is mostly close, and Wi-Fi on campus. There are no books in the library. There are no clean bathrooms. The quality of the food is the worst ever. There is hot water with sugar and colour.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Rajasthan Unani Medical College and HospitalReviewed on 7 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied by this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have a hostel but provides good equipment for sports. Medical facilities are excellent, and Wi-Fi facility is not provided by the college. Classrooms, etc., are very good and clean, and the infrastructure is nice but has to be improved much more.

reviews.review_heading: Studies are good quality, location is bit odd, infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: We have all types of labs for every subject. The anatomical lab is well-equipped with bones and structures, the physiology lab has every test material, and the pharmacy lab has all related equipment. Other labs like pathology, PSM, and organon labs are also well-maintained. Talking about the hostel facilities, it is a very good place to live, the food is good, and all other amenities are available. Grounds are provided for sports, and equipment for other games is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by National Institute of AyurvedaReviewed on 12 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good choice for students who want to pursue B.A.M.S.
reviews.review_text: It has decent infrastructure, experienced and well-qualified faculty, and a well-stocked library and laboratory. The only problem is that students don't get hostel accommodation in the 1st year and also face difficulty in the 2nd year to get a hostel. The hostels are good with all facilities, but you have to stay outside in a PG or flat for approximately 2 years before being able to get a seat in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of its campus, teaching faculty, events, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Each classroom has A.C., digital facilities, as well as blackboards along with Wi-Fi. Subjects like anatomy, physiology, and other department-related subjects have their own labs. In my hostel, there are attached washrooms with geysers. The college conducts sports events along with cultural programs every year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the university is great, whether it comes to infrastructure or the environment.
reviews.review_text: Always the best, girls and boys have separate hostels. The library has Wi-Fi and magazines. Medical facilities are the best, and even an ATM and bank are available within the university. So a person can fulfill their basic requirements within the university.

reviews.review_heading: Only government Ayurvedic university in Rajasthan, all colleges are under this university.
reviews.review_text: Food is okay, the hostel is good, and overall, the infrastructure is good. The hostel campus is very big, and everything is good. College is very strict with attendance, so maintain your attendance. Overall, the course is good, and the faculty is also good and supportive.
